I'm happy not to be dealing with the hassle, sorry for the hassled... but amused at the images the whole thing conjures. Mon May 11 21:08:30 +0000 2009 Replying to @brettbobley That's better medical care than most of us get at home! Tue May 12 00:32:20 +0000 2009 Replying to @loganpoppy Hmm. Wonder what that's all about - looks like all the URLs have changed. Not good. Tue May 12 13:53:46 +0000 2009 Replying to @halavais Heh. My school's portal team only tested on IE for Windows until somebody \(ahem\) pointed out that 40% of faculty were Mac users. Tue May 12 15:56:09 +0000 2009 Which does not even begin to take account of \(a\) the students, who are heavier Mac users, and \(b\) the insanity of promoting use of IE... Tue May 12 15:57:28 +0000 2009 Replying to @veek Somehow I suspect not! Tue May 12 21:01:23 +0000 2009 New blog post: Blog-Based Peer Review http://bit.ly/13aFjm Tue May 12 23:39:10 +0000 2009 Started update to 10.5.7 approx 30 min ago \(post download\) . iMac has been restarting for about 20. Many variations on blue screen... Wed May 13 00:21:39 +0000 2009 Trying really hard to be patient & not jump for the power switch. Wed May 13 00:22:17 +0000 2009 40 min was enough. Went the hard reboot route. From what I can tell from the web, I'm not alone. Still restarting, but past the blue screen. Wed May 13 00:42:27 +0000 2009 Whew. Repairing disk permissions. All appears to be well. Wed May 13 00:47:25 +0000 2009 Replying to @kwerb yup. I had to download the package from the website, and even then it was a mess installing. Wed May 13 01:54:19 +0000 2009 Holy crap - SCMS now cancelled. Wed May 13 02:42:20 +0000 2009 New blog post: Here's Hoping You're Not on the Plane Yet http://bit.ly/m9kwd Wed May 13 02:43:57 +0000 2009 Replying to @d_kompare and @chutry Heh: Bobbie Gentry, Ode to Billy Joe. I'll take that, but do NOT attempt to figure out how old I am. Thu May 14 03:10:36 +0000 2009 Really really wishing there were some way to block #lost related posts until I get a chance to watch it tonight... Thu May 14 16:50:18 +0000 2009 Replying to @briancroxall Congratulations to you, mom, and the player yet to be named! Fri May 15 19:24:51 +0000 2009 Replying to @MissLadyB Alas, not so much with the good news: I think that article is from last year, pre-Prop 8. LA Times fail. Fri May 15 23:42:07 +0000 2009 Two of three commencement speakers were newspaper columnists; both took potshots at the Internet. Coincidence? Sun May 17 18:40:39 +0000 2009 In IAH, on my way back to Boston. Really really wish I'd had a day to recuperate, post-graduation. But -- onward! Mon May 18 22:24:31 +0000 2009 Replying to @j_l_r You completely rock - congratulations! It'll be nice to have you in California. Tue May 19 11:47:11 +0000 2009 New blog post: The Future of Everything http://bit.ly/6UR4r Tue May 19 13:11:57 +0000 2009 Jason Mittell: given state of video in 1999, it's naive to think we can guess what it'll look like in 2019. #acfoe Tue May 19 13:14:24 +0000 2009 Mittell: a few guesses, though. Video industry stops selling plastic in boxes; more battles over DRM/DMCA. #acfoe Tue May 19 13:15:42 +0000 2009 Mittell: one prescriptive claim for future - video literacy across the curriculum, not just read-only, but read-write. #acfoe Tue May 19 13:17:57 +0000 2009 Mittell: video/audio must become searchable, annotatable. #acfoe Tue May 19 13:19:13 +0000 2009 Replying to @michaeldroy Astral projection? #acfoe Tue May 19 14:19:14 +0000 2009 Chuck Henry's presentation on the future of research perfectly sets up my presentation this afternoon on the future of peer review. #acfoe Tue May 19 14:44:27 +0000 2009 Replying to @xina Did somebody say drink? Tue May 19 14:54:44 +0000 2009 Can't read that URL for NSF task force report; can somebody tweet? #acfoe Tue May 19 15:00:24 +0000 2009 Replying to @thfondak Thank you! Tue May 19 15:04:36 +0000 2009 Problem with moving to pay-per-view access is the paying part - access is fine as long as it's available, but what if costs escalate? #acfoe Tue May 19 15:31:51 +0000 2009 Replying to @loganpoppy one suggestion that's been made is a sort of pay to play: earn the right to publish by reviewing #acfoe Tue May 19 18:18:05 +0000 2009 Replying to @loganpoppy We have a significant crisis \(if a few more presses close\) & a significant opportunity \(look what cool stuff can be done\) #afcoe Tue May 19 18:53:54 +0000 2009 Replying to @loganpoppy The trick is communicating that - and getting "names" on board... #afcoe Tue May 19 18:54:32 +0000 2009 Replying to @jmittell Hear, hear! Thanks, @michaeldroy! Tue May 19 20:10:17 +0000 2009 Waiting for the train to Boston. From the Future of Everything to the ALA, or the Past of At Least Some Stuff. Wed May 20 14:28:57 +0000 2009 Replying to @loganpoppy I thought my ears were burning! Wed May 20 14:43:51 +0000 2009 Replying to @GeorgeOnline That's your campus's configuration; mine has IMAP enabled, so I use Apple Mail from home. Thu May 21 12:31:04 +0000 2009 RT @mkgold @cunycommons CUNY Academic Commons releases WPMu/MediaWiki Single Sign-on: http://is.gd/C9i9 - will transform my teaching sites! Fri May 22 13:00:44 +0000 2009 Replying to @moncia Saw that - very exciting! Fri May 22 15:31:41 +0000 2009 What I want: a WP footnote plugin that pops up a small CSS layer window on mouseover. Surely that exists? Fri May 22 15:34:33 +0000 2009 New blog post: Must Read: HASTAC/MLA Rethinking Tenure Guidelines http://bit.ly/YTtK7 Fri May 22 15:48:53 +0000 2009 I'm at a conference in what used to be my field. And am surprised by the vehemence of my "used to be." This is not my field anymore, at all. Fri May 22 17:25:56 +0000 2009 The good news is that I'm taking advantage of a lovely hotel room to get a jump start on my summer's work. Fri May 22 17:31:37 +0000 2009 Replying to @kfitz Hey, that's very sneaky there, @dancohen: a little inobtrusive . gets you around the blocked @reply issue. Nice! Fri May 22 17:42:05 +0000 2009 Replying to @kfitz .@mattbucher Thanks for that. I really needed it! \(RT: Wow, this just brightened my day a ton: http://bit\.ly/CXpWm\) Fri May 22 18:06:44 +0000 2009 New blog post: Homeward Bound http://bit.ly/4ipJGr Sun May 24 12:26:28 +0000 2009 Logan's a nice airport, but it has *the* most humorless airport personnel. Everybody here is cranky. Holiday weekend? Or do we need a nap? Sun May 24 16:52:55 +0000 2009 Favorite uncle had 8 operations in 3 months trying to save his leg. It's failed; they're amputating. Now it's in the other leg. #fuckinghell Sun May 24 22:40:24 +0000 2009 Replying to @xina and @noradio Thanks so much for the thoughts. It just sucks. Mon May 25 15:55:04 +0000 2009 Come on, California: don't let me down. Tue May 26 16:56:21 +0000 2009 Shit. Tue May 26 17:03:35 +0000 2009 RT @bighandsome: Other things upheld today? My middle finger, being waved in the direction of the state supreme court. Tue May 26 17:34:09 +0000 2009 Replying to @d_kompare Hell, yes; I'd absolutely support that. Tue May 26 17:34:51 +0000 2009 Replying to @loganpoppy Not that we only go to places that allow freedom to marry, but that we do not support those that have explicitly disallowed it. Tue May 26 17:51:21 +0000 2009 Replying to @GeorgeOnline I'm a big fan of Coda, made by the folks who make Transmit \(so Transmit is built in\) ... Wed May 27 14:00:00 +0000 2009 Replying to @amandafrench I refuse to use "outcomes" & instead use "goals." Goals I can have. Outcomes sounds like ve have vays of mekking you learn. Wed May 27 16:03:47 +0000 2009 Replying to @amandafrench Ergh. I can see the usefulness, I guess, but part of me worries that outcomes are something I can't promise. Objectives, yes. Wed May 27 16:34:53 +0000 2009 .@GeorgeOnline: Panic holding a 3 day sale: 50% off Coda, Transmit https://www.panic.com/sale/ \(via @clioweb\) Wed May 27 17:06:00 +0000 2009 Replying to @loganpoppy Yeah, I do, both Coda and Transmit. Like them both a lot. Wed May 27 17:30:48 +0000 2009 Replying to @briancroxall If you've recently updated the firmware of your Airport to 7.4.1, that could be the culprit: http://bit.ly/zslqc Thu May 28 01:24:44 +0000 2009 Has anyone successfully migrated from Bookends 10 to Zotero? Found this http://bit.ly/lfsKx but seems to be based on 9 - can't make it work. Thu May 28 18:30:19 +0000 2009 Never mind -- I think I may have sorted something out. May have a lot of cleaning up to do, but at least the data's out. Thu May 28 18:43:57 +0000 2009 Replying to @kfitz .@sivavaid Salt. Open wound. Not nice. :) Thu May 28 21:30:23 +0000 2009 Sorely tempted to use last of this year's research fund to buy a Wii. Teaching dig media studies without owning a console just feels wrong. Thu May 28 23:14:41 +0000 2009 Replying to @mkirschenbaum Good grief; I've been found out at last! Must go, um, recredentialize. Fri May 29 00:42:50 +0000 2009 Okay, decision about Wii pretty much made. Next question: what are the games I should absolutely not be without? Fri May 29 14:38:21 +0000 2009 Replying to @thfondak Cool, thanks! Fri May 29 14:43:54 +0000 2009 Excellent suggestions, all - thanks! Fri May 29 14:50:17 +0000 2009 Replying to @theorymeg Will do! Fri May 29 14:53:02 +0000 2009 Replying to @stoton They're on the list - thanks! Fri May 29 15:07:41 +0000 2009 Replying to @plragde Kinda makes you think you picked the wrong field... Fri May 29 15:55:24 +0000 2009 Amazing how much fun editing 350+ citations imported to Zotero format can be. Feels like productivity, without all that difficult thinking. Fri May 29 16:48:33 +0000 2009 Replying to @foundhistory I'd like to believe that's true; spending a morning correcting bad special characters and tags ought to count for something! Fri May 29 17:00:14 +0000 2009 Replying to @nowviskie Nice that they're thinking about it, but yeah. Vastly better if it indicated that some people *choose* other routes on purpose. Fri May 29 22:55:29 +0000 2009 Okay, Wii has been ordered. Now what am I supposed to do with myself until Tuesday? Oh, yeah - work - right. Fri May 29 23:32:41 +0000 2009 Replying to @nancybaym Oh, man - congratulations! I hope that sometime in the next 75 days I'm tweeting the same thing... Sat May 30 17:03:14 +0000 2009 Okay, I'm puzzled. @GeorgeOnline just .@replied to someone I don't follow, but even with the . it didn't appear in my stream. What gives? Sat May 30 21:06:59 +0000 2009 Found the post when someone I do follow RTd it. Will be sorely annoyed if twitter has undone the . hack... Sat May 30 21:08:38 +0000 2009 Replying to @nancybaym It's on the social & institutional changes that digital scholarly publishing will require of the academy. & it's due Aug 15. Eek! Sat May 30 23:19:17 +0000 2009 New blog post: Five Years Later http://bit.ly/APZaF Sun May 31 02:57:12 +0000 2009 Replying to @andrewspong Well, the good news is it's under contract! The bad news is August 15 August 15 August 15... Sun May 31 11:17:29 +0000 2009 Double espresso and a friend's article. Then a student's chapter, a bit of admin, and finally the book. Nobody send me anything else to do. Sun May 31 13:09:41 +0000 2009 Replying to @d_kompare Hey, backatcha! Sun May 31 13:21:41 +0000 2009 Replying to @sivavaid There are a few overachievers: http://bit.ly/oWePI Sun May 31 14:13:51 +0000 2009 New blog post: Dr. George Tiller, RIP http://bit.ly/TgupH Sun May 31 20:36:40 +0000 2009
docs.title: 2009 05 01 tweets

docs.text: Headed to DC, trip 1 of 2 this month. Worst security backlog I've seen at ONT in ages, but things finally moved. Should be on time. Mon Jun 01 13:14:14 +0000 2009 TSA doing random secondary screenings at gate at IAH. More visible police presence here & at ONT. Do they suspect something in AF flight? Mon Jun 01 17:27:41 +0000 2009 Oh, man, the eastern time zone just kicks my ass every single time. Tue Jun 02 11:29:38 +0000 2009 Replying to @cnearman Hey, thanks! Such nice thinks to say just when I was planning on tweeting my hotel restaurant versus room service dilemma... Wed Jun 03 00:01:28 +0000 2009 DCA>IAH>ONT. Excellent trip, and great time spent at NEH, but happy to be headed home. \(Which has nothing to do with the Wii waiting there\.\) Wed Jun 03 15:19:26 +0000 2009 Replying to @barbarahui I ordered that - it's waiting for me at home! I expect to be up all night... Wed Jun 03 21:00:48 +0000 2009 Sitting here in IAH during a long layover just goofing off. And feeling guilty about it. That's an overdeveloped work ethic right there. Wed Jun 03 21:35:23 +0000 2009 Replying to @plragde Am goofing around on the free wifi. I usually work really well on planes, since it's the one place no one can get ahold of me. Wed Jun 03 22:08:51 +0000 2009 Have been taxiing from gate to runway for 30 min. At least 15 planes ahead of us still. Don't they know I have a Wii to get home to? Wed Jun 03 23:52:56 +0000 2009 Hey, you'll never guess what I had waiting for me when I got home last night! Thu Jun 04 14:37:02 +0000 2009 Replying to @nancybaym A Wii! If only someone could invent a package that translates Wii usage into writing productivity. Maybe using the balance board. Thu Jun 04 15:49:17 +0000 2009 Replying to @cscannella Zelda, Super Mario Galaxy, Rayman Raving Rabbids, Okami, and Wii Fit. Will get World of Goo soon! Thu Jun 04 15:56:43 +0000 2009 A puzzle: when I bought dig. camera, it came with a tiny SD card; bought a larger one & swapped out. Extra SD card now nowhere to be found. Thu Jun 04 18:22:17 +0000 2009 Vaguely remembering buying some other device that needed an SD card, and recycling - but what device? Completely baffled. Thu Jun 04 18:23:06 +0000 2009 The good news: SD cards now insanely cheap. Thu Jun 04 18:25:05 +0000 2009 Replying to @briancroxall Wow, that's very cool. I was just thinking storage, but I'll keep this in mind for the next camera! Thu Jun 04 18:40:34 +0000 2009 Replying to @therefore Want to make some kind of Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind joke. Instead I'll just wonder if the iPhone/rice trick wd work. Thu Jun 04 18:54:20 +0000 2009 Do not feel like working. Does my massively sore throat justify spending the rest of the day playing? Thu Jun 04 22:13:34 +0000 2009 Whatever amusement value this cold may have held has long since worn off. Knock it off, sinuses; I have thinking to do. Sun Jun 07 17:34:24 +0000 2009 Oh, and PS: I live on the edge of the desert. It has rained every day for a week. In June. I'm not complaining but it does raise questions. Sun Jun 07 17:38:43 +0000 2009 Replying to @mikejolk Indeed! The Newton: a technology whose time has \(finally\) come. Sun Jun 07 19:33:24 +0000 2009 Replying to @cscannella Tethering is built into iPhone 3.0, so usable with any updated iPhone. Mon Jun 08 19:03:33 +0000 2009 Replying to @briancroxall and @jbj True, but the MacRumors guys took that as a "not yet" rather than a "not." I'm hoping for sooner rather than later. Mon Jun 08 19:09:24 +0000 2009 Replying to @jbj Well, crap. I guess I chose to hear it in both cases. That's what good optimism does me. Mon Jun 08 19:15:02 +0000 2009 Replying to @noradio Whoa. Mon Jun 08 19:42:38 +0000 2009 RT @noradio: "Existing AT&T customers who want to upgrade...price with a new two-year agreement is $499 \(8GB\) , $599 \(16GB\) , or $699 \(32GB\) ." Mon Jun 08 19:43:54 +0000 2009 As a valued AT&T customer, we can offer you a discounted iPhone upgrade at a higher price, along with a 2-yr commitment & $18 upgrade fee... Mon Jun 08 19:54:17 +0000 2009 ...You may qualify for a full discount on a standard iPhone upgrade on 01/16/2010." Hmph. Mon Jun 08 19:54:43 +0000 2009 No surprise that "as a valued AT&T customer" is a dangling clause. Somebody really needs a primer on the definition of "to value." Mon Jun 08 19:57:35 +0000 2009 PS: I also love the "discounted upgrade at higher price" versus "full discount on standard upgrade." Mon Jun 08 19:58:59 +0000 2009 Replying to @j_l_r I think 18 months is the charm... Mon Jun 08 20:33:07 +0000 2009 RT @mediacommons: Media studies folks: Have a great blog? Or know of one? We'd like to include it in "In Syndication." Contact for more info Mon Jun 08 20:43:08 +0000 2009 Horrible disgusting cold seems to be well along on the snot-to-phlegm transition. TMI, no doubt, but it's cause for celebration on my end. Tue Jun 09 16:03:42 +0000 2009 In the last 5 min: I figured out what the chapter I'm writing is about. And then realized that's what the entire book is about. Head rush! Tue Jun 09 18:31:58 +0000 2009 I now owe @mkirschenbaum dinner. Thanks for inadvertently helping me figure it out! Tue Jun 09 18:33:18 +0000 2009 Replying to @mkirschenbaum Very much look forward to smashing crabs! Fear this realization may change my @dh09 pres a bit, tho. Okay, deep breath... Tue Jun 09 18:52:07 +0000 2009 @JenServenti Not as bitter as my former student who just found out the newest Real World house is a block from her apartment, I'd wager. :) Thu Jun 11 03:45:37 +0000 2009 Replying to @JenServenti Oh, hey. I read the first one! See, if you guys had had "dorm rooms like palaces," you might have been featured, too. Thu Jun 11 03:46:39 +0000 2009 Replying to @jwolman Dowdy like PALACES, you mean. Thu Jun 11 04:45:48 +0000 2009 Just to let you know, the grand what's-it-all-about revelation has now resulted in 5 pages of awesome new text. In case you were wondering. Thu Jun 11 17:01:43 +0000 2009 Replying to @GeorgeOnline Insofar as I am surprised, it is only pleasantly so, at the sudden ease. Nice to remember how much fun writing can be. Thu Jun 11 17:11:20 +0000 2009 Replying to @xina Will do! \(And thanks for the cheers \- I can use them\.\) Thu Jun 11 17:32:22 +0000 2009 Excited for everyone involved in @infinitesummer. Having just emerged from InfiniteSpringDoublePlus, I'm cheering from the sidelines. Thu Jun 11 17:56:04 +0000 2009 Crud. Was going to include link to last semester's class \(http://bit\.ly/DmRFV\) in last tweet, but hosting provider has hosed WPmu. Thu Jun 11 17:57:20 +0000 2009 Replying to @GeorgeOnline plannedobsolescence.net is hosted @Dreamhost & is fit & fine! machines.pomona.edu is, alas, not, not, and not. Thu Jun 11 18:25:47 +0000 2009 Okay, InfiniteSpring is now once again available \(http://bit\.ly/DmRFV\) for your @infinitesummer perusal. Turns out to have been hacked. Grr. Thu Jun 11 18:35:09 +0000 2009 Have 6.5 page introduction to new chapter. Also have lots of research to do for rest of chapter. But man it feels good to be writing again! Thu Jun 11 22:39:19 +0000 2009 Replying to @ndnous Not off the top of my head - can you give me more info? Title/journal/full author name? Thu Jun 11 22:48:11 +0000 2009 Replying to @d_kompare Sadly, no. Her upkeep is both labor- and time-intensive. Fri Jun 12 02:08:27 +0000 2009 Just finished widgetizing the blog theme. Now to break everything again by upgrading to WP 2.8. Fri Jun 12 22:18:04 +0000 2009 Wow. I've had Twitter Tools running in my WP install tho posts are turned off. Just found *all* my tweets in my WP db. Effortless archiving! Fri Jun 12 22:55:38 +0000 2009 Okay, operation update-all-the-web-software-to-discourage-the-butthead-miscreants is complete. I guess I have to go back to real work now. Sat Jun 13 00:22:44 +0000 2009 A bit of research accomplished. Annual report draft completed. Big pot of gumbo on the stove. Not a bad Saturday, on the whole. Sun Jun 14 01:06:11 +0000 2009 Replying to @billwolff Yes - my #wordpress 2.8 is without timezone support as well. A puzzlement. Sun Jun 14 14:19:15 +0000 2009 Replying to @jcmeloni and @billwolff I did automatic update; I wonder if that's the culprit. #wordpress Sun Jun 14 14:40:04 +0000 2009 Replying to @billwolff and @jcmeloni Could be. I'll try turning off plugins one at a time and see if that's it. But my settings appear exactly as in 2.7... Sun Jun 14 14:50:12 +0000 2009 Replying to @billwolff and @jcmeloni ...which makes me think it's something that failed to auto-update. Sun Jun 14 14:50:33 +0000 2009 Replying to @billwolff Oh, hey - just spotted a forum issue that sounds like yours: http://bit.ly/l9FVx - no answer yet, but something not right there. Sun Jun 14 14:56:29 +0000 2009 Replying to @billwolff That's no good! Figured out my problem: timezone support requires PHP5.2, which my host claims to be running, but isn't... Sun Jun 14 15:17:44 +0000 2009 Replying to @billwolff Okay, forced an upgrade to PHP5.2, and timezone support now appears as advertised. I hope your issues work out! Sun Jun 14 15:22:06 +0000 2009 Replying to @billwolff The @DreamHost settings panel thought it was running 5.2.x. I hit "submit" as if I had changed settings, which somehow did it. Sun Jun 14 15:47:36 +0000 2009 Replying to @billwolff Probably if yours claims 5.2.9, it's really running. You might try this test, tho: http://bit.ly/2UnIC6 Sun Jun 14 15:50:08 +0000 2009 New blog post: Ambivalence http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/ambivalence/ Sun Jun 14 16:00:22 +0000 2009 Replying to @KTBoyer Indeed! \(God, was that class ten years ago?\!? Time flies\.\) Sun Jun 14 16:38:23 +0000 2009 The strangest [almost] sequence of tweets I've gotten, as follows: Sun Jun 14 22:33:34 +0000 2009 \(1\) RT @wmrandth: Anyone know this film name? Plot is: man comes from South America & works as janitor in LA, then becomes succesful teacher Sun Jun 14 22:33:58 +0000 2009 followed by \(2\) RT @mikhailg: Criterion Collection edition of Videodrome. Want. Sun Jun 14 22:34:13 +0000 2009 Brain just exploded. Sun Jun 14 22:34:32 +0000 2009 Replying to @alechosterman Thanks - I was wondering where that landed. :) Mon Jun 15 03:00:55 +0000 2009 New blog post: This Week http://bit.ly/1ajYiJ Mon Jun 15 16:11:53 +0000 2009 One of the best things about making gumbo? Leftovers. Truly a better-the-second-day food. Tue Jun 16 02:00:53 +0000 2009 Replying to @kakennedy Congratulations! Tue Jun 16 22:38:25 +0000 2009 Spent all morning on project find-hacks-and-patch-holes. I think I've finally got them; the flood of spam-driven inbound links has stopped. Thu Jun 18 20:28:31 +0000 2009 Replying to @cluettron HEY. I resemble that remark! Thu Jun 18 21:17:44 +0000 2009 Hey - anybody have a sample @scholarpress courseware site I can peek at? Would like to see it in action! Sat Jun 20 23:56:59 +0000 2009 New blog post: And Then This Week http://bit.ly/ZJ93t Sun Jun 21 20:29:12 +0000 2009 In the last few mins, folks in NYC, Auckland, and Amsterdam have found my teaching site by googling "hypermediation." Is something up? Sun Jun 21 20:56:34 +0000 2009 My flt to DCA tmw gets in at 5pm; Metro to UMD abt 6pm; then cab to Marriott. Prob too late for LM talk, but hope to make reception. #dh09 Mon Jun 22 00:49:49 +0000 2009 Replying to @mamamusings Wow. That's ambitious. Are you using a mail client that can help? Will look forward to hearing how it turns out. Mon Jun 22 00:56:02 +0000 2009 Updating all the portable devices for the trip. Next: prepare house for departure, reserve cab, pack. Digital first, analog after. :) #dh09 Mon Jun 22 01:10:17 +0000 2009 Just... wow. RT @ErikaJL: Buffy FTW!!! http://bit.ly/px9YI "Buffy Shuts Down Edward Cullen In The Best Clip Ever" #btvs #twilight Mon Jun 22 02:32:42 +0000 2009 At the airport and through security by 4.45 am. This is the only thing I hate about living on the west coast. Mon Jun 22 11:56:22 +0000 2009 Okay, slept on the first flight; need to work on this one. Either that or I'll be finishing my presentation in the hotel room tonight. #dh09 Mon Jun 22 17:36:56 +0000 2009 okay, I'm here, but killed my battery on the plane. must go in search of power outlet. #dh09 Mon Jun 22 22:07:05 +0000 2009 Yay, Matt! @mkirschenbaum with last info & intro before Manovich plenary. #dh09 Mon Jun 22 22:37:15 +0000 2009 Replying to @xina That's not hard for me to understand, but it might be worth a second look... Mon Jun 22 22:52:10 +0000 2009 Replying to @xina And *that* I understand even better, I assure you. :) Tue Jun 23 02:00:08 +0000 2009 Stupid jetlag: after 3.5hrs sleep night b4 last, up until 2am, completely overslept & missed 1st panel. Happily, it got good coverage! #dh09 Tue Jun 23 15:16:34 +0000 2009 In #dh09 panel, "Supporting the DH"; presentation from Steven Krauwer on CLARIN & ways the project could fail - not always expected ways. Tue Jun 23 15:23:32 +0000 2009 Keep getting kicked off network - not wireless, but authentication. What gives? Tue Jun 23 15:23:59 +0000 2009 Potentials for failure: lack of agreement on standards, lack of financial support, ignoring content evolution #dh09 Tue Jun 23 15:24:56 +0000 2009 And the key ingredient is STANDARDS. #dh09 Tue Jun 23 15:26:09 +0000 2009 Replying to @JenServenti NEH: your national chocolate provider. Tue Jun 23 15:31:00 +0000 2009 Chad Kainz: in DH projects, 1/3 time spent on scholarship, 2/3 spent on technology - how to bring resources together to shift balance? #dh09 Tue Jun 23 15:53:30 +0000 2009 Curious whether there are other small liberal arts college folks at #dh09; will confess to having serious R1 envy now. I want a DH center! Tue Jun 23 16:10:32 +0000 2009 @fraistat on building network of DH centers; good thinking about making it inclusive, but what about smaller institutions w/o ctrs? #dh09 Tue Jun 23 16:14:31 +0000 2009 Replying to @nowviskie Good to know - thanks! #dh09 Tue Jun 23 16:15:19 +0000 2009 I want to find ways to foster partnerships between such smaller institutions that can't found ctrs and existing DH ctrs #dh09 Tue Jun 23 16:19:11 +0000 2009 Replying to @jtheibault We'll have to meet up! Would love to hear what you're doing... Tue Jun 23 16:21:09 +0000 2009 Replying to @jasonrhody I hope to apply for one of these for 2010-11, but need the partnership in place, as app has to originate with center, no? #dh09 Tue Jun 23 16:26:49 +0000 2009 Replying to @ddchamberlain Absolutely! Let's find a time to get together once I'm back in SoCal; would love to hear what you're working on. #dh09 Tue Jun 23 18:08:31 +0000 2009 Grr. RT @profhood The college of 2020? http://bit.ly/Mm8yF Want full report? $75 for 50pp "paper" digital report. Fail. http://bit.ly/17179k Tue Jun 23 19:38:46 +0000 2009 About to present on the future of the university press in the Jimenez room. #dh09 Tue Jun 23 20:00:05 +0000 2009 Replying to @amandafrench Thanks! Laptop's Internet connex has failed so will have to catch up once I can get back on. iPhone too unwieldy! #dh09 Tue Jun 23 20:51:26 +0000 2009 Anybody other than me lose their Internet connection? Got kicked off and can't get back on. Was it something I said? #dh09 Tue Jun 23 21:02:38 +0000 2009 Replying to @stoton Hey, thanks for that! Great pres, by the way - definitely want to talk Drupal with you.. Tue Jun 23 21:23:48 +0000 2009 Man, what a day. Crashing now, so that I might actually make the 9 am session tomorrow. Wish me luck! Fri Jun 26 00:57:19 +0000 2009 Replying to @Kylewarneck Poor Sanford - 48 hours early. Any #thatcamp-ers headed to Auld Shebeen around 6? Have to miss meetup, alas; it's at Auld Shebeen. Fri Jun 26 20:03:05 +0000 2009 Replying to @digitalhumanist How ling do you think you'll be there? About to head out from DC... Sat Jun 27 00:43:18 +0000 2009 @digitalhumanist By which I meant to ask how LONG you'll be there, but couldn't correct before entering the metro blackout zone. Sat Jun 27 01:08:15 +0000 2009 Replying to @GeorgeOnline So where are you at this point? Almost to Fairfax & trying to decide where to have the cab take me... Sat Jun 27 01:12:17 +0000 2009 Replying to @jasonrhody You are not kidding. Sat Jun 27 01:13:06 +0000 2009 Replying to @kfitz Ugh. So Chain Bridge Rd & !?? Sat Jun 27 01:18:12 +0000 2009 Replying to @GeorgeOnline Dunno how I managed to reply myself. Will hope to see you there. Amazing to see so many great folks here! Sat Jun 27 13:34:13 +0000 2009 Getting a rundown of the #thatcamp ethos. Very, very excited about this: undoing many of the things wrong with academic comferences. Sat Jun 27 13:50:27 +0000 2009 Replying to @halavais Very sorry you're not here, too! #thatcamp Sat Jun 27 14:23:38 +0000 2009 Replying to @plragde No self-aggrandisement: no reading papers that say "here's how smart I am"; no questions after that say "here's how dumb you are." Sat Jun 27 15:05:50 +0000 2009 Replying to @plragde Most brilliant part so far: very short lunchtime demos; at 3 mins, you get played off by keyboard cat. Sat Jun 27 16:50:31 +0000 2009 Was too anxious abt time to be clear, so will reiterate: we're actively seeking contributions @mediacommons http://bit.ly/17K3VV #thatcamp Sat Jun 27 17:11:52 +0000 2009 Replying to @nowviskie I'm definitely bringing that to the program committee of the MLA :) #thatcamp Sat Jun 27 17:23:07 +0000 2009 @sramsay The Cohen thesis: "I feel the 'digital' will fade from 'humanities' over time." #thatcamp Sat Jun 27 17:35:41 +0000 2009 Replying to @briancroxall Which camp? #thatcamp Sat Jun 27 18:13:55 +0000 2009 Really want to know what theme your Drupal e-lit class is using, @zachwhalen - very nice! #thatcamp Sat Jun 27 18:59:11 +0000 2009 Replying to @sramsay and @foundhistory because much of that group is housed in other depts \(German, English, etc\) despite studying media objects? #thatcamp Sat Jun 27 20:04:39 +0000 2009 Replying to @sramsay True - but it's also necessary to say you're DH if you study new media because non-DH grantors haven't funded it in past. #thatcamp Sat Jun 27 20:16:45 +0000 2009 Replying to @zachwhalen Thanks! I really want to poke at your set-up more; you've built great content types and views; very exciting. #thatcamp Sat Jun 27 20:18:01 +0000 2009 It's nearly 5 pm. Do you know where your beers are? #thatcamp Sat Jun 27 20:39:00 +0000 2009 AXE \(Ajax XML Encoder\) : http://bit.ly/14vgac ; AXE white paper: http://bit.ly/RpJHl #thatcamp Sat Jun 27 21:12:45 +0000 2009 Replying to @briancroxall and @boonebgorges Rats! I wanted to see that demo. Bad schedule metadata. :( #thatcamp Sun Jun 28 14:56:09 +0000 2009 Anybody know what the upshot of the Software Development panel in the next session is? #thatcamp Sun Jun 28 15:53:42 +0000 2009 Replying to @joguldi and @mattthomas Yes, mostly note-taking and organization, inspired by Steven Johnson: http://bit.ly/GT7lA #thatcamp Sun Jun 28 16:37:05 +0000 2009 Replying to @mattthomas Oh, excellent stuff - thanks! \(I particularly need the scripting info\.\.\.\) #thatcamp Sun Jun 28 16:51:17 +0000 2009 Sfizi Cafe closed on Sun. Next option? Sun Jun 28 17:39:48 +0000 2009 Replying to @bboessen Thanks for the rec; we found our way to another \(open\) Italian place, so all was well! Sun Jun 28 20:53:33 +0000 2009 At DCA awaiting my flight home from #dh09 and #thatcamp. It's been an amazing week but I look forward to being home so I can process it all! Sun Jun 28 20:56:42 +0000 2009 Replying to @eboehnisch I did, mostly just sharing my workflow and organizational/searching strategies, which are pretty simple. It's a great product! Mon Jun 29 06:11:52 +0000 2009 Replying to @sramsay Hey, have I got a book project for you! http://bit.ly/C5zdR - ms hopefully available by early fall. Mon Jun 29 14:10:28 +0000 2009 Replying to @sramsay Thanks so much! Once the project's out \(also in trad\. print format for provost/dean\-gifting\) I plan on putting together a roadshow. Mon Jun 29 14:26:52 +0000 2009 Replying to @sramsay There are a very few who are starting to get it, but yes, there's an overwhelming reluctance to change there. Mon Jun 29 14:29:32 +0000 2009 @sramsay Glad they're being forced to hear the "change or die" message. Here's hoping the former happens before the latter. Mon Jun 29 14:30:09 +0000 2009 Replying to @sramsay Hey, good luck with that. If it works, let me know how you pulled it off. I've mostly kept my bomb-tossing confined to conferences. Mon Jun 29 15:28:46 +0000 2009 Pretty much done unpacking the new office. For a basement, it's pretty flash. http://yfrog.com/0t57881378j Tue Jun 30 01:38:55 +0000 2009 Office view #2. http://yfrog.com/0ypovj Tue Jun 30 01:40:05 +0000 2009 Office view #3. Note the fire alarm; used to be a classroom. I do not eagerly await the first fire drill. http://yfrog.com/15w5oj Tue Jun 30 01:42:14 +0000 2009 Replying to @kfitz ~@jmittell It's unbecoming, I admit. But the previous office was off the charts gorgeous. I'm happy this one is starting to feel like home. Tue Jun 30 01:43:47 +0000 2009 Replying to @fearv I'm sure we can arrange something. Tue Jun 30 01:44:25 +0000 2009 Replying to @jasonrhody Well, now that you've posted this it's clouded over, but yeah. We're actually only half-underground, which makes it much better. Tue Jun 30 01:45:29 +0000 2009 Replying to @triproftri We all deserve such an office! I'm just lucky that my former chair defended the building so fiercely during the last renovation. Tue Jun 30 01:49:07 +0000 2009 Replying to @jmittell Don't give them any ideas! Tue Jun 30 01:49:40 +0000 2009 Replying to @academicdave Do they include "at hard labor" in sentences anymore? If there were ever a case that deserved it... Tue Jun 30 01:59:16 +0000 2009 Replying to @bighandsome Heh. Happily, it's not that basement, despite the allure of bar proximity. I just moved two floors downstairs. Tue Jun 30 02:05:43 +0000 2009 Replying to @themba Thanks! I look forward to testing the couch out soon. Tue Jun 30 02:06:09 +0000 2009 Replying to @jwolman It's the only way to bookmark things like links you want to come back and read later. Tue Jun 30 14:07:20 +0000 2009 Replying to @tmcphers In that order? Tue Jun 30 16:30:41 +0000 2009 Drinks to toast my last day in the English department, spent as the first day working in my Media Studies office. Tomorrow, a whole new day.
