I keep forgetting\.\) Wed Dec 14 20:14:11 +0000 2011 Replying to @moncia Thanks! We're pretty excited about it. Wed Dec 14 20:50:10 +0000 2011 Replying to @samplereality Does it involve Elvis? Thu Dec 15 04:25:43 +0000 2011 Replying to @fraistat I see your 8 hours and raise you 2 days. Thu Dec 15 21:42:40 +0000 2011 Replying to @fraistat Oh, no! I'm at the END of 2 days; I'm done soon. \(Right? Soon?\) Good luck with your own day 2! Thu Dec 15 21:45:45 +0000 2011 I will confess to being mildly curious about the selection, but hey, I can totally belt it out if called upon. #dhoke http://dhoke.herokuapp.com Fri Dec 16 02:03:43 +0000 2011 4.45am. LGA. Security line stretched almost out the door. Happy holidays! Fri Dec 16 09:47:04 +0000 2011 Super sorry to be missing many amazing things in NYC today. Among them @mkirschenbaum's NYPL talk. Ah, well; filial duty calls. Fri Dec 16 15:15:42 +0000 2011 Replying to @captain_primate Now that's an awesome Christmas present! Sun Dec 18 15:01:23 +0000 2011 BTR > IAH > LGA. Beginning the long trip home. Sun Dec 18 21:14:26 +0000 2011 Replying to @rgfeal Lovely weekend but way too short! Sun Dec 18 21:42:32 +0000 2011 Replying to @nowviskie Ooh, smart. Tue Dec 20 14:49:31 +0000 2011 Replying to @miriamkp Congratulations! Fabulous news, Miriam. Tue Dec 20 15:01:13 +0000 2011 Here's how the month of December has gone for me thus far: 1.5 days in the office; family funeral; travel to Sweden; full-day meeting. + Wed Dec 21 13:16:00 +0000 2011 2 days in the office, 2 full-day meeting, travel to Baton Rouge, 2 full-day meeting. And that brings us up to today. + Wed Dec 21 13:16:08 +0000 2011 In 21 days, I've had 3.5 to get stuff done. And I wonder why I'm the teeniest bit stressed out. Wed Dec 21 13:16:17 +0000 2011 Replying to @unsworth Congrats to you and Brandeis! I look forward to hearing more great stuff soon. Wed Dec 21 15:00:58 +0000 2011 HUGE thanks to my friends at @digitalcampus \(and especially @foundhistory\) for the very kind words in the 2011 Campies! http://digitalcampus.tv/2011/12/21/episode-79-the-2011-campies/ Wed Dec 21 16:13:04 +0000 2011 Replying to @KelliMarshall I have upgraded 1 of 3 sites, with no trouble. Will tackle others soon! Wed Dec 21 21:24:31 +0000 2011 Replying to @samplereality Is the North Pole not a signatory to the Geneva Convention? Thu Dec 22 14:46:39 +0000 2011 Replying to @wynkenhimself and @samplereality Now wondering who will take his place as what the French call the North Pole's "homme fort." Thu Dec 22 15:01:36 +0000 2011 “@bfeld: considering boycotting GoDaddy since they support SOPA” cc @moncia Thu Dec 22 17:45:36 +0000 2011 Oh, the Weather Outside is Frightful \(ly Warm, for This Time of Year\) : http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/blog/oh-the-weather-outside-is-frightfully-warm-for-this-time-of-year/ Thu Dec 22 21:55:41 +0000 2011 December 22. Irish whiskey on the terrace of awesomeness. Unseasonable, but I'll take it. Thu Dec 22 23:20:51 +0000 2011 Replying to @Ed_Raso Not exactly, no. Especially not after last year. Thu Dec 22 23:21:16 +0000 2011 Replying to @maximolly Me too! Sometime soon, though. Fri Dec 23 00:00:05 +0000 2011 Ah, productivity: I am spending part of this morning restoring my ayphone, which my computer suddenly fails to recognize. #grrrr Fri Dec 23 15:27:17 +0000 2011 Or rather, it recognizes it but thinks it syncs with another computer, and so wants to delete everything & make me manually restore. #grrrr Fri Dec 23 15:28:21 +0000 2011 Replying to @KelliMarshall I've actually all but stopped running, so I'm not a good person to ask, alas. Runner's World used to do good reviews, though. Fri Dec 23 15:37:45 +0000 2011 Head cleared, house organized, writing clarified. Holidays begun! Here's hoping yours are just as swell. Fri Dec 23 18:43:40 +0000 2011 Well, I have successfully restored my ayphone and have even added some fun things. Not exactly faster or stronger, but definitely better. Fri Dec 23 22:36:27 +0000 2011 Replying to @paleofuture Just marveling that you were in THIRD grade in 1992, while that was the SECOND presidential election I voted in. #sigh Fri Dec 23 23:32:15 +0000 2011 Maggie Smith just caused me to do a spit-take. Literally. Sat Dec 24 01:49:01 +0000 2011 Replying to @phdaisy I do, too! It's actually a season 2 moment \(shhh\!\) . Sat Dec 24 01:53:32 +0000 2011 Replying to @wynkenhimself Downton Abbey, but I like to think it would be exactly the same. Sat Dec 24 01:54:28 +0000 2011 Replying to @annehelen Ah, that was a good one too! No, this is a moment... um... to come. Sat Dec 24 01:55:20 +0000 2011 Replying to @phdaisy In which case. it was "I wouldn't say I was *planning* it." :) Sat Dec 24 01:57:19 +0000 2011 I have a big pile of writing to do, & I promised myself I'd get a bunch of it done this weekend and next. But I really want to read a novel. Sat Dec 24 16:02:41 +0000 2011 Replying to @amandafrench and @jenhoward That's the permission I was seeking. Thank you both! Sat Dec 24 16:08:40 +0000 2011 Replying to @amandafrench and @jenhoward Oh, this is no time of year for invidious value judgments. Sat Dec 24 16:11:44 +0000 2011 Replying to @amandafrench and @jenhoward \(Which is to say that I'm still trying to finish the George R\. R\. Martin silliness so I can move on already\.\) Sat Dec 24 16:12:32 +0000 2011 Replying to @amandafrench and @jenhoward There are days when I'm really happy the aypad doesn't display what I'm reading on the cover. Sat Dec 24 16:14:07 +0000 2011 Replying to @samplereality, @amandafrench and @jenhoward Seriously. And yet I can't stop. Even though I know my desire for closure will be frustrated. Sat Dec 24 16:15:46 +0000 2011 One day, as god is my witness, I will make a roux that is dark enough. #stupidpalegumboagain Sat Dec 24 22:47:01 +0000 2011 That dark roux is going to require three things I lack: a good cast-iron skillet; peanut oil; sufficient cojones. Sat Dec 24 22:53:35 +0000 2011 Replying to @debcha Exactly. The "don't turn your back for a second" factor makes me way too cautious. Sat Dec 24 22:59:42 +0000 2011 The good news is that the gumbo is going to rock anyhow, even if it is a little timid. Sat Dec 24 23:06:33 +0000 2011 Replying to @patrick_mj The dangers of digital publishing models! Sun Dec 25 17:44:22 +0000 2011 Replying to @wynkenhimself Thank you, Sarah! Mon Dec 26 16:45:02 +0000 2011 This has been a thoroughly lovely long holiday weekend. But must get back to work; pls send a week's worth of good prolific writing vibes. Mon Dec 26 16:47:09 +0000 2011 \(Bum shoulder ceasing to hurt so I can concentrate vibes would also be much appreciated\.\) Mon Dec 26 16:48:03 +0000 2011 Replying to @jbj Thanks! And right backatcha, for whatever you need 'em for! Mon Dec 26 16:50:04 +0000 2011 Replying to @savasavasava I will reflect them back your way, doubled! Mon Dec 26 16:51:59 +0000 2011 Replying to @moncia Ooh, thank you. I hope that your holidays are treating you well! Mon Dec 26 17:25:57 +0000 2011 Replying to @rgfeal Thanks; I could definitely use them. \(I imagine vibes coming from there are powerful indeed\!\) Mon Dec 26 17:28:21 +0000 2011 Introspection alert: The Year in Review, at Planned Obsolescence. http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/blog/the-year-in-review/ Mon Dec 26 19:10:54 +0000 2011 Replying to @nicholasbirns Fantastic! I'm thoroughly looking forward to it. #mla12 Mon Dec 26 20:52:39 +0000 2011 I mean this utterly without sarcasm: I'm very happy to be at work today. Easy commute, quiet office, and a plan to get some writing done. Tue Dec 27 13:37:23 +0000 2011 Replying to @rgfeal Ooh, good for you. I, however, refuse to allow thoughts of yoga and massages detract from my present in-office happiness. Tue Dec 27 15:01:12 +0000 2011 Replying to @wynkenhimself Hey, you too, wherever you are! Tue Dec 27 15:02:03 +0000 2011 Replying to @wynkenhimself Good for you! Sharing all the fabulous productivity vibes that got sent my way yesterday... Tue Dec 27 15:05:18 +0000 2011 Replying to @samplereality Oh, no. Take care, Mark. Tue Dec 27 18:14:22 +0000 2011 Yes, the title is a dorky Greenblatt joke. No, I do not think of myself as Queen. \(Yet\.\) New at Planned Obsolescence: http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/blog/the-public-scholars-two-bodies/ Tue Dec 27 18:15:09 +0000 2011 I've had such a great day working that I forgot to stop and go get lunch. Whoops. #notmakingitup Tue Dec 27 21:05:55 +0000 2011 Replying to @briancroxall Ooh, sorry! I will send job vibes you way, stat. Tue Dec 27 21:07:21 +0000 2011 Replying to @briancroxall Not at all! I'm extremely lucky, and it's good to be reminded of that. Tue Dec 27 21:08:11 +0000 2011 Replying to @mmwwah Oh, it's an appropriation wrapped in a remix, wrapped in bacon. Tue Dec 27 21:21:44 +0000 2011 Sitting in a bar wondering why it suddenly feels like 1981 in here. Takes a second to sink in: Rush. Tom Sawyer. Dude. Fri Dec 30 00:02:13 +0000 2011 Replying to @mariabustillos Entirely possible! Fri Dec 30 00:11:42 +0000 2011 And it has taken this long for the second penny to drop: THAT WAS THIRTY YEARS AGO. #officiallyold Fri Dec 30 00:44:58 +0000 2011 Replying to @surlyF Aw man. Fri Dec 30 01:21:05 +0000 2011 Replying to @samplereality I'm so sorry - my best thoughts to you, your wife, and the rest of your family. Fri Dec 30 04:13:55 +0000 2011 Replying to @briancroxall Glad you've caught up with us! Where've you been? #mla12 Fri Dec 30 15:31:00 +0000 2011 Replying to @briancroxall A little over two weeks ago! Sorry you've been sick, but I hope not for that long... Fri Dec 30 15:31:52 +0000 2011 Replying to @briancroxall That would do it. One needs free forearms in order to manipulate the mobile app. Fri Dec 30 15:32:57 +0000 2011 Replying to @briancroxall Aha. Yes, there's that, too. Fri Dec 30 15:33:45 +0000 2011 Lies, Damned Lies \(on Planned Obsolescence\) http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/blog/lies-damned-lies/ Fri Dec 30 16:49:44 +0000 2011 Replying to @samplereality and @rgfeal Ooh, excellent. Will do! Fri Dec 30 17:55:21 +0000 2011 Replying to @briancroxall Wow. I am so curious what that means in the 5yo's context. Sat Dec 31 00:36:29 +0000 2011 Replying to @noctambulate I have that dream all the time. Sometimes the elevators move in spirals or become streetcars. I never get where I was going. Sat Dec 31 14:43:18 +0000 2011 Replying to @noctambulate My variant last night was trying to negotiate a university campus in a European country in order to get to a doctor's appt. + Sat Dec 31 14:49:28 +0000 2011 Replying to @noctambulate Bureaucracy, technology, translation - an awful mix. Sat Dec 31 14:50:12 +0000 2011 A bunch of annoying problems have me sorely tempted to wipe my hard disk and do a clean reinstall. Maybe it's just New Year's Eve talking. Sat Dec 31 20:13:25 +0000 2011 Either that or I'm dragging my heels on writing my last #mla12 presentation... Sat Dec 31 20:17:21 +0000 2011 Replying to @trentmkays I know. It would be a full day's worth of work getting things reinstalled, and this is NOT the time. But it's so tempting... Sat Dec 31 20:25:24 +0000 2011 Replying to @unsworth Did the Lion upgrade eons ago, which is part of the problem. The rest turns out to be software & won't be fixed by a reinstall. Sun Jan 01 02:49:00 +0000 2012
docs.title: 2011 12 01 tweets

docs.text: My entire apartment is vibrating. I can't wait to get up at 6 am and clomp around in heavy boots. \(PS: Happy New Year\.\) Sun Jan 01 07:38:56 +0000 2012 Produced 5.5pp of my final preso today, 3.1pp of which are not bad. Miles to go, though; sometimes a long flight is a good thing! #mla12 Mon Jan 02 21:45:17 +0000 2012 Replying to @katinalynn Fantastic post! Looking forward to seeing you in Seattle. Tue Jan 03 04:26:15 +0000 2012 Replying to @triproftri and @rgfeal Alas, no. We weren't able to integrate that feature in our first iteration; we'll put it on our list, though! Tue Jan 03 18:10:56 +0000 2012 Replying to @jwolman Interesting... Tue Jan 03 21:01:33 +0000 2012 Replying to @sleonchnm Thanks! It really helped me a lot just to be able to articulate the lostness... Wed Jan 04 00:11:37 +0000 2012 Packed. Not exactly ready to go, but heading out before the crack of dawn anyhow. See you in Seattle, all. #mla12 Wed Jan 04 04:15:10 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself Aaaargh! Meant to replenish the biz card case today. That's thing # 2 I forgot, so I'm hoping that's it. Wed Jan 04 04:17:19 +0000 2012 Replying to @briancroxall and @wynkenhimself I have a few. I'll hope that just repeating "kfitz" enough covers it. Wed Jan 04 04:26:39 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself and @briancroxall Oh man. I have yet to have a convention encounter that worthwhile. Wed Jan 04 04:27:57 +0000 2012 At EWR for flight to SEA. Charging devices; also, self. #coffee #mla12 Wed Jan 04 12:51:31 +0000 2012 Replying to @jmittell Thanks, Jason - for the travel wishes and \(more importantly\) for taking the time to think through the issues on our behalf! #mla12 Wed Jan 04 12:54:12 +0000 2012 Replying to @jmittell Yes! I would love to get you there. Wed Jan 04 12:56:02 +0000 2012 Replying to @jmittell Definitely! Wed Jan 04 12:57:20 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal Ready to go! Wed Jan 04 13:18:27 +0000 2012 On light rail in Seattle. On turning on the phone, was greeted by 5 txts and 50 emails. This is going to be an interesting few days! #mla12 Wed Jan 04 20:49:10 +0000 2012 I take it back. It's gmail - so it's 50 new email *threads*, not messages. #sigh Wed Jan 04 20:59:22 +0000 2012 Replying to @samplereality Heh. $2.75 to downtown. Very nice. Westlake stop is very near Sheraton/WSCC. Wed Jan 04 22:10:50 +0000 2012 Oh, hey! It's 5pm, NYC time. Last time I ate was breakfast. No wonder I'm hungry! Wed Jan 04 22:22:25 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal Wow, sounds fantastic! Thu Jan 05 00:34:53 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal I'm in the Renaissance; a bit of a hike, but nice and quiet. Not that I'll be spending much time here! Thu Jan 05 00:38:45 +0000 2012 If you run into me at #mla12 and I do the nametag scan it's not because I'm a snob. It's because I suck at remembering names out of context. Thu Jan 05 01:44:20 +0000 2012 Okay, getting ready to brave the howling winds and walk down to the Sheraton… #mla12 Thu Jan 05 02:07:23 +0000 2012 The calm before the storm. #mla12 Thu Jan 05 02:36:56 +0000 2012 Replying to @MLAconvention and @briancroxall Srsly! It's $2.75 and stops 2 blocks from the Sheraton. Thu Jan 05 02:38:29 +0000 2012 Replying to @briancroxall Excellent. You want the end of the line. Sending good suitcase vibes. Thu Jan 05 02:41:49 +0000 2012 Replying to @Ed_Raso Yeah, I'm that kinda elite traveler. Thu Jan 05 03:08:49 +0000 2012 Replying to @tmcphers Thanks! I'm just sorry you're not with us again this year. Thu Jan 05 03:11:01 +0000 2012 Replying to @tmcphers Wait! You are! Not with the program yet, so to speak. :( Thu Jan 05 03:12:00 +0000 2012 Replying to @tmcphers When I checked in, the hotel said, we have you here for 5 nights. I said... if you say so. Them: Until Monday. Me: What's today? Thu Jan 05 03:16:22 +0000 2012 Replying to @Ed_Raso You know it. Thu Jan 05 06:33:44 +0000 2012 Replying to @mkgold and @uminnpress Congrats! Can't wait to see it in person. Thu Jan 05 06:38:35 +0000 2012 Replying to @Ed_Raso Oh, shoot. I guess I should probably not hang out here in my pajamas, then? Thu Jan 05 07:03:23 +0000 2012 Replying to @samplereality On the other hand: traveling across the country to hang out with your friends who talk abt literature is pretty much awesome. Thu Jan 05 07:14:25 +0000 2012 Replying to @samplereality RIGHT? Thu Jan 05 07:14:36 +0000 2012 Replying to @samplereality Okay, maybe not so much. Thu Jan 05 07:26:06 +0000 2012 Replying to @samplereality I hear that. Thu Jan 05 07:33:18 +0000 2012 Replying to @johnmjones Fantastic news! Thu Jan 05 15:00:27 +0000 2012 Replying to @JenHoward Better than "Goodnight Saigon," I guess. Thu Jan 05 16:11:40 +0000 2012 Replying to @tmcphers Trying to find that myself. Will tweet. Thu Jan 05 17:01:20 +0000 2012 Replying to @amandafrench and @tmcphers Nope! MLA2012. Case-sensitive. Thu Jan 05 17:23:30 +0000 2012 RT @MLAconvention: Have a Flickr account? Post your convention photos and tag them mla12 to add them to our slideshow in the WSCC! Thu Jan 05 17:48:30 +0000 2012 5 minutes to close my eyes. A little lunch for ballast. And then on to #s34 #mla12 The Future of Peer Review! Thu Jan 05 19:51:12 +0000 2012 Hey, #mla12 folks: remember that you can add a session hashtag like #s34 to make the Twitter stream even more searchable. Thu Jan 05 20:13:09 +0000 2012 Replying to @DanConnell Came in late; standing at the back! Thu Jan 05 20:20:27 +0000 2012 Replying to @ibogost All liquids must be in containers of less than 100ml. Thu Jan 05 20:21:59 +0000 2012 Replying to @briancroxall There are power strips in many rooms around the blogging/tweeting tables. Thu Jan 05 20:26:16 +0000 2012 +1 RT @surlyF: ALL faculty!! RT @rgfeal: Jaschik: humanities fac undercut own arguments when they don't know budgets & univ finances. #MLA12 Thu Jan 05 22:42:34 +0000 2012 Replying to @DanConnell Thanks! Got a quick rest and am back at it. Will look forward to crossing paths again. #mla12 Thu Jan 05 22:43:50 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal, @nowviskie and @surlyf Very sorry I missed @scottjaschik. Great discussion, however, and thanks for the tweets! #mla12 #s43 Thu Jan 05 22:45:17 +0000 2012 Sid Smith kicking of the Future of Higher Education session with 4 macro narratives of higher education's future. #mla12 #69 Thu Jan 05 23:40:50 +0000 2012 Replying to @eetempleton Fingers crossed for you! Thu Jan 05 23:44:45 +0000 2012 SIdonie Smith's 5-point action plan for a sustainable humanities is powerful, visionary: transformation, not transition. #mla12 #s69 Thu Jan 05 23:53:12 +0000 2012 RT @amandafrench: 5-point plan: 1) transform doctoral education, 2) form new ethics and praxis of schol communication 3) open access #mla12 Thu Jan 05 23:54:22 +0000 2012 RT @amandafrench: Smith: 4) reconceptualize our ecology toward collaboration 5) update our narrative of the humanities. #mla12 Thu Jan 05 23:54:48 +0000 2012 Replying to @amandafrench and @jasonrhody How did the two of you get in the room and not say hi to me? Hmph. #mla12 Fri Jan 06 00:02:23 +0000 2012 Replying to @jasonrhody and @amandafrench No kidding! Okay, continue holding up the wall, but you're not allowed to leave w/o saying hi. #mla12 Fri Jan 06 00:08:00 +0000 2012 Replying to @eetempleton Woo! Fri Jan 06 00:30:31 +0000 2012 Replying to @foundhistory I can't speak for Chicago, but Seattle is definitely bummed you're not here, too. #mla12 Fri Jan 06 01:04:05 +0000 2012 Replying to @brettbobley Oh, you know. Sat around. #mla12 #aha2012 Fri Jan 06 01:06:18 +0000 2012 RT @MLAconvention: Got #mla12 photos? Add an mla12 tag on Flickr and see them in the reg area of the WSCC. Fri Jan 06 01:06:31 +0000 2012 Okay, so the Fairmont is pretty fancy. #mla12 Fri Jan 06 01:26:46 +0000 2012 Replying to @johnmjones There's a pretty good helping of schmancy in with the fancy. Fri Jan 06 02:49:00 +0000 2012 .@mlatweetup! Tweeps, if you're in the Sheraton, bring your badge to the 35th floor and come say hi! #mla12 Fri Jan 06 06:51:57 +0000 2012 Meeting 1 down already. Upcoming: meeting, presentation, session, media interview, presentation, meeting, pres address, reception. #mla12 Fri Jan 06 16:25:08 +0000 2012 Really excited about all of it, especially the presidential forum at 10.15 and the presidential address at 6.30! #mla12 Fri Jan 06 16:26:01 +0000 2012 Replying to @dougreside My Sunday am talk is on open access. Will def include then. Fri Jan 06 16:47:05 +0000 2012 Replying to @johnmjones Is all I'm saying. Fri Jan 06 17:57:04 +0000 2012 Hey #mla12 tweeps: you guys rock. Thanks so much for the great reception! Fri Jan 06 18:45:14 +0000 2012 Replying to @MichaelBerube1 I know, right?! Fri Jan 06 18:47:23 +0000 2012 RT @MLAconvention: Check out recommendations for #mla12 sessions, food, etc. at http://www.mla.org/yourconvention and comment with your link. Fri Jan 06 19:29:19 +0000 2012 .@tanyaclement Happy birthday, Ms. T! I hope it's a great one. Fri Jan 06 19:37:37 +0000 2012 Replying to @edwardoneill No, meaning it's not the *only* important form. #mla12 Sat Jan 07 00:21:22 +0000 2012 Replying to @edwardoneill That's a big part of the argument of this panel: that there is a much wider range of modes of scholarship than the monograph + Sat Jan 07 00:29:02 +0000 2012 Replying to @edwardoneill so why not a much wider range of forms of the dissertation? Other forms might better represent 21st c competencies. Sat Jan 07 00:29:46 +0000 2012 Replying to @jcmeloni heh. Sat Jan 07 00:43:42 +0000 2012 Replying to @jcmeloni Hmmm. Good question! :) Sat Jan 07 00:47:42 +0000 2012 At the presidential address. Come celebrate the fantastic presidency of Russell Berman in Metropolitan A. #mla12 Sat Jan 07 02:44:49 +0000 2012 Pres. Berman: foreign language programs receive 0.1% of the Dept of Education's discretionary budget. #mla12 Sat Jan 07 03:37:14 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal and @katinalynn Absolutely! So glad to have you join us. Sat Jan 07 04:01:40 +0000 2012 RT @MLAconvention: Hey, #MLA12 peeps! Stop in Metropolitan B at Sheraton til 9:15 for free drink to honor Pres Berman! @mlatweetup Sat Jan 07 04:34:57 +0000 2012 Replying to @edwardoneill But we weren't talking about eliminating it! We were talking about opening up multiple paths. Sat Jan 07 06:47:58 +0000 2012 Replying to @dancohen You guys should look into some kind of pneumatic tube arrangement. Sat Jan 07 14:32:25 +0000 2012 Replying to @edwardoneill Sigh. We were not being prescriptive. We were arguing for opening up a discussion about possibilities. Sat Jan 07 18:34:45 +0000 2012 RT @MLAconvention: 25% off all titles in the MLA exhibit booth today and tomorrow! This special discount is only available during the co ... Sat Jan 07 19:27:10 +0000 2012 Replying to @tmcphers and @rgfeal So great seeing you; thanks for all the tweets! #mla12 Sat Jan 07 21:49:00 +0000 2012 It's not entirely true that libraries lose access to dig jrnls when subscr end. Agreements now include right of perpetual access. #MLA MLA Sat Jan 07 23:07:28 +0000 2012 Replying to @BendProf Not anymore - was a problem, but is being addressed. See Pl Obs chapter 4! #mla12 Sat Jan 07 23:08:35 +0000 2012 It's not entirely true that libraries lose access to dig jrnls when subscr end. Agreements now include right of perpetual access. #mla12 Sat Jan 07 23:11:48 +0000 2012 Replying to @RepoRat No, of course. But was countering a "libraries lose everything!" comment. Sat Jan 07 23:12:28 +0000 2012 RT @S_moores: #s539 #mla12 @briancroxall #alt-ac cannot be short for contracted labor. Must be an avenue for thinking about career path ... Sun Jan 08 00:02:44 +0000 2012 Thanks, Shana! // RT @elotroalex: @shanakimball sends a shoutout to @kfitz : "Planned Obsolescence should be required reading." #s539 #mla12 Sun Jan 08 00:07:48 +0000 2012 At the MLA Awards Ceremony, hearing the award for lifetime scholarly achievement presented to Fredric Jameson. #mla12 Sun Jan 08 03:19:02 +0000 2012 "Our business is not to know, in the philosophers' sense, but to see what it is that we can tell." --Fredric Jameson #mla12 Sun Jan 08 03:24:54 +0000 2012 Replying to @jbj, @tcarmody and @samplereality Is the doxa in question the proper viewing order? There is but one. Sun Jan 08 08:06:45 +0000 2012 Replying to @jbj, @tcarmody and @samplereality Hmph. I watch 'em, but like my whiskey, can only take 'em unadulterated. Sun Jan 08 08:08:43 +0000 2012 Replying to @tcarmody and @jmittell March 21-25. Boston. Be there. Sun Jan 08 08:17:37 +0000 2012 RT @MLAconvention: Good morning #MLA12 on last day! Please, everyone go to sessions and support Sunday presenters! Sun Jan 08 14:27:41 +0000 2012 (As one of those Sunday presenters, it would be nice to have some of you there!0 #s674 #mla12 Sun Jan 08 14:28:59 +0000 2012 Getting ready to talk abt "Giving It Away: Sharing & the Future of Scholarly Comm" in Sheraton Willow A at 10.15. Come join me! #s674 #mla12 Sun Jan 08 17:15:14 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself YAY! Sun Jan 08 17:43:09 +0000 2012 Replying to @academicdave I quote you in the paper. Sorry you're not here for it! \(I'll be posting it in the next few days, though\.\) Sun Jan 08 17:48:07 +0000 2012 Replying to @academicdave The quote I'm using is from a comment you left on PO: "Knowledge which is not public is not knowledge." Sun Jan 08 17:51:28 +0000 2012 Sadly, I will not be live tweeting my talk, but perhaps @wynkenhimself might! #s674 #mla12 Sun Jan 08 18:10:04 +0000 2012 RT @MLAconvention: Hi, @russellbermanSF!! Last day of #MLA presidency, first day on Twitter! #MLA12AtHome Sun Jan 08 22:10:49 +0000 2012 Replying to @pmhswe Thank you! It was such an engaged discussion - I was thrilled to get to be part of it. Great to see you! #s674 #mla12 Sun Jan 08 22:22:34 +0000 2012 Replying to @nmhouston and @rgfeal So glad you were here, and sorry I never got to say hi! I'm glad you had a great #mla12. Sun Jan 08 22:23:56 +0000 2012 Replying to @briancroxall and @nyupress Thanks so much - the support is really appreciated! #mla12 Sun Jan 08 22:49:42 +0000 2012 Replying to @mkgold Wow; that's awesome! Thanks, Matt! Sun Jan 08 22:53:22 +0000 2012 RT @mkgold: I bought a copy of Planned Obsolescence for my Provost. He read it & we had 30 min convo about changing nature of scholarly comm Sun Jan 08 22:53:52 +0000 2012 My first #MLA as a member of the staff was exhausting and wonderful, and I'm sad to see it end! Thanks to all of you for making it so great. Sun Jan 08 23:20:20 +0000 2012 Replying to @ncecire I know - just not enough time. I hope your convention was fantastic, and that there's more fantastic from here. Sun Jan 08 23:22:34 +0000 2012 Replying to @eetempleton GAH! Mon Jan 09 01:17:03 +0000 2012 An aside: #mla12. http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/blog/mla12/ Mon Jan 09 12:32:53 +0000 2012 Scott Jaschik of IHE covers the new dissertation possibilities discussed at #mla12. http://www.insidehighered.com/news/2012/01/09/mla-considers-radical-changes-dissertation Mon Jan 09 13:52:59 +0000 2012 DH and Comp/Rhet: What We Share and What We Miss When We Share by @mkgold \(via @ReadItLater\) http://mkgold.net/blog/2012/01/07/dh-and-comprhet-what-we-share-and-what-we-miss-when-we-share/ Mon Jan 09 14:45:45 +0000 2012 Replying to @jwolman I know, right?! It's taken all the discipline I have to keep this whole academic discourse thing front and center. Mon Jan 09 14:50:51 +0000 2012 Replying to @jasonrhody and @rgfeal Thank *you*! It was great having you there, contributing in so many ways. Safe travels. #mla12 Mon Jan 09 14:54:32 +0000 2012 Replying to @DanConnell Excellent! I'll look forward to it, too - and to more chats online in the interim. #mla12 #mla13 Mon Jan 09 22:00:06 +0000 2012 Replying to @ryancordell Thank *you* for making #mla12 so awesome with the DHCommons workshop. I hope we'll get to talk longer next time! #mla12 Mon Jan 09 22:22:51 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself Dude. Thank *you*. Looking forward to our next venture! @rgfeal #mla12 Mon Jan 09 22:23:34 +0000 2012 Replying to @fraistat I've actually got one Thursday and Friday! Just doing one little Ignite talk; that's sort of a hair of the dog, I think. Mon Jan 09 22:31:25 +0000 2012 Replying to @sivavaid Oh you did NOT. Tue Jan 10 04:15:43 +0000 2012 I am not entirely sure that I see that "long-form scholarship… needs the interdependent notions of author, text, and originality." + Tue Jan 10 04:27:57 +0000 2012 I do, however, see that traditional scholars believe that it does. - Tue Jan 10 04:28:37 +0000 2012 Replying to @tcarmody That would be my reading, too. Unless long-form scholarship doesn't circulate in interpretive communities. Tue Jan 10 04:39:08 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal It was, quite. I also liked "after the fall." Tue Jan 10 04:42:01 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal Happily, the paychex are a teeny bit larger. Tue Jan 10 04:44:49 +0000 2012 RT @Ted_Underwood: Okay. Fish gets an extra five points for referring to a fictional version of himself *in* a post on the instability o ... Tue Jan 10 05:37:44 +0000 2012 Replying to @bukuwawa Oh yeah. Tue Jan 10 06:20:06 +0000 2012 Had they asked, I might have noted a big difference between LOL and their/there, but a nice interview nonetheless. http://mynorthwest.com/11/606724/Modern-Language-Association-doesnt-mind-your-LOLs-BRBs Tue Jan 10 13:39:04 +0000 2012 The MLA: we're not just persnickety grammarians! Tue Jan 10 13:40:57 +0000 2012 Trying out this "blog" thing \(and posting the text of my Presidential Forum address from \#mla12\) : Networking the Field. http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/blog/networking-the-field/ Tue Jan 10 14:50:36 +0000 2012 Replying to @miriamkp It is! And will therefore not be around for long. Tue Jan 10 15:20:33 +0000 2012 RT @samplereality: A full professor cites an assistant professor's comment on a graduate student's blog. Thu Feb 16 07:16:06 +0000 2012 Replying to @Ed_Raso Excellent choices! Thu Feb 16 07:23:20 +0000 2012 I have been sitting in a most dismal lounge in the worst terminal at Newark airport for three hours. And I've got at least two to go. Thu Feb 16 21:42:25 +0000 2012 And, as you've probably guessed, I'm feeling the tiniest bit whiny about it. Thu Feb 16 21:42:42 +0000 2012 Replying to @plragde How have they not bulldozed terminal A yet, I ask you. Thu Feb 16 21:48:10 +0000 2012 Replying to @HilarieAshton Hey, thanks! That's an outlook brightener. Thu Feb 16 21:48:50 +0000 2012 Replying to @Ed_Raso I am crying. Thu Feb 16 21:50:27 +0000 2012 Replying to @katinalynn Yeah, there's no way I can leave and get back in time at this point. Thu Feb 16 22:10:36 +0000 2012 Got up today in my Munich hotel room at 5 am. Will get into my Lexington hotel room at midnight if I'm lucky. It will be 6 am in Munich. Thu Feb 16 22:13:52 +0000 2012 \(Yep, still whining\.\) Thu Feb 16 22:14:00 +0000 2012 Replying to @cscannella God forbid it should fall into the hands of a minor. Thu Feb 16 22:35:11 +0000 2012 Replying to @annettemarkham I will confess to being spoiled by my lounge access. Which is visible because this one is pretty ratty. Thu Feb 16 22:36:54 +0000 2012 Replying to @annettemarkham Oh, completely! The Lufthansa lounges in Munich are heavenly. Thu Feb 16 22:41:01 +0000 2012 Replying to @brettbobley and @annettemarkham I missed the beach volleyball! But I did note that it was stunningly efficient and easy to navigate. Thu Feb 16 22:44:29 +0000 2012 Replying to @dancingdivala I'm sorry I'll miss you, too! Thu Feb 16 22:46:05 +0000 2012 After 6 hours in EWR, my flight to ORD was just cancelled. Let the whining recommence! Thu Feb 16 23:35:53 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself May have to. But unless I can get out early, We may have to reschedule the whole thing. Thu Feb 16 23:45:02 +0000 2012 Replying to @plragde This was in many ways not an ideal itinerary. Becoming less ideal by the minute. Thu Feb 16 23:47:32 +0000 2012 Looks like I have a 6am flight out tomorrow. So, spend an hr getting home tonight & an hr getting back in the morning, or get hotel voucher? Thu Feb 16 23:57:14 +0000 2012 Replying to @samplereality Ha. I thought I was trying to get into the airport, but it turns out I was inside all along! Thu Feb 16 23:59:09 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal Considering I slept 2 hours last nt & then got up at 5 for a 9 hr flight, followed by a 6 hr layover, cats have little influence. Fri Feb 17 00:04:13 +0000 2012 Have voucher for the Ramada. Am not terribly optimistic about this. But must go to sleep in the next hour or risk total meltdown. Fri Feb 17 00:29:40 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal SIGH. Fri Feb 17 00:37:16 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal Phew. Thanks for the info - am aiming at that sleep now. Fri Feb 17 00:47:23 +0000 2012 Replying to @bigjondaniel Hmmm. Sounds possible. Fri Feb 17 00:48:34 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal Room appears fine. Thx! Fri Feb 17 00:56:14 +0000 2012 Okay - 6 solid hours of sleep. Now waiting for the airport shuttle, coffee in hand. Let's try this again. Fri Feb 17 09:19:58 +0000 2012 And they put me on an overbooked flight, so I have no seat. If I get arrested for screaming at someone, I hope you'll testify on my behalf. Fri Feb 17 10:03:38 +0000 2012 Belay that last; now have seat. If I get arrested, it'll be my own damn fault. Fri Feb 17 10:26:41 +0000 2012 Replying to @jmittell The "customary service" autocorrect strikes me as entirely apropos. Fri Feb 17 10:31:17 +0000 2012 Replying to @jmittell Sounds like a job for @samplereality. Fri Feb 17 10:42:52 +0000 2012 I do have a seat. In the very last row, in a seat with a negative recline. But it *is* a seat. Fri Feb 17 10:44:53 +0000 2012 Literally, this seat is at least 7 degrees more upright than the usual CRJ seat. Which means at least two inches less space in front of me. Fri Feb 17 10:47:19 +0000 2012 Replying to @jmittell and @samplereality Or an algorithm that substitutes any word over 6 letters with a similar one that falls higher on a frequency list. Fri Feb 17 10:51:36 +0000 2012 Replying to @Ed_Raso Okay, okay. Fri Feb 17 10:57:09 +0000 2012 Okay, Detroit achieved, connection made, and a much better seat on the next plane. I hesitate to speak too soon, but we may be in business. Fri Feb 17 13:11:58 +0000 2012 Replying to @captain_primate waves back! Fri Feb 17 13:17:23 +0000 2012 48 hours, 5 airports, and 2 hotels later, Lexington! Fri Feb 17 14:46:29 +0000 2012 Replying to @samplereality There has been vague talk - we need motivated locals to take the lead! #mla13 #THATCamp Fri Feb 17 15:05:57 +0000 2012 Now *that* was a night's sleep! Sat Feb 18 12:21:18 +0000 2012 Had a fantastic time in Lexington yesterday; so glad I was able to make it in time. Thanks to Jeff Rick & to everyone who turned up. Sat Feb 18 12:26:57 +0000 2012 So far: EWR > MUC > BUD > MUC > EWR > DTW > LEX. Today: LEX > ORD > EWR > home! Sat Feb 18 12:27:20 +0000 2012 Dude, Jeff RICE. Slept so well I can't type today. Sat Feb 18 12:28:11 +0000 2012 Replying to @triproftri No, that's today's itinerary. Cross your fingers for me. Sat Feb 18 12:32:13 +0000 2012 Replying to @marymolinaro Thank you! I'm sorry to have missed saying hi. Lex was great; thanks to all for the hospitality. Sat Feb 18 15:01:40 +0000 2012 Since @samplereality's Q is getting RT'd, I'm RTing my A: the program cte would love an #mla13 THATCamp, but locals need to take the lead! Sat Feb 18 17:37:37 +0000 2012 On board at ORD; now to EWR, and then the AirTrain, and then NJTransit. And then, weather permitting, I'm walking the rest of the way home. Sat Feb 18 18:48:15 +0000 2012 This whole "walk home from Penn Station" idea doesn't look too good right now. Sat Feb 18 21:39:17 +0000 2012 Replying to @jtheibault I just need the rain to hold off for 40 minutes... Sat Feb 18 21:42:40 +0000 2012 Replying to @2xlp Chilly I can do. Just want the rain to hold off... Sat Feb 18 21:46:30 +0000 2012 I am always faintly amazed when I arrive home after a week and actually find my house keys in my bag where I dropped them. Sat Feb 18 22:25:09 +0000 2012 Replying to @2xlp Made it. Other than the usual tourist crush, the weather was fine. Sat Feb 18 22:36:09 +0000 2012 Replying to @Ed_Raso I made it safe and dry, but that may not last long. Sat Feb 18 22:36:42 +0000 2012 This has been one of my more disgusting homecomings. Cat puke, clogged sink, backed-up and incredibly stinky dishwasher. + Sun Feb 19 00:22:03 +0000 2012 Maybe I'll just go back to Newark? Sun Feb 19 00:22:24 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal Kittehs seem okay, though they want me to stop cleaning and just sit down with them! Sun Feb 19 01:13:57 +0000 2012 Replying to @captain_primate Woo. The good news is that I will wake up Sunday morning with a clean house. Sun Feb 19 01:18:01 +0000 2012 Replying to @CathyNDavidson I saw it when you first posted! It's awful - but sadly, I'm not at all surprised by it. So many contracts are so one-sided. Sun Feb 19 17:35:49 +0000 2012 Replying to @captain_primate Even better may be that they've posted the long-missed iOS app \(allowing playback of non\-mp4 video\) ! Sun Feb 19 19:00:25 +0000 2012 Replying to @captain_primate I got the iOS app before it got yanked, and so have been running it all along. Wonder if this one can run on non-jb iOS? Sun Feb 19 19:03:30 +0000 2012 Replying to @samplereality and @captain_primate That's exactly what the issue was, but the app is now being distributed by VLC itself… Sun Feb 19 19:47:17 +0000 2012 Replying to @sherah1918 Great minds - mine is pinto beans & kale. Tell me how yours turns out! Sun Feb 19 22:24:17 +0000 2012 Why did it take me until this weekend to realize that a too-warm winter means more awesome terrace time? Sun Feb 19 22:27:27 +0000 2012 Replying to @sherah1918 Nice! I'm still waiting somewhat impatiently. But there will be a yellow rice variant, and probably Cholula. Sun Feb 19 22:50:03 +0000 2012 RT @coblezc: New post: thoughts on @kfitz Planned Obsolescence #oa #openaccess #repositories http://zachcoble.com/words/future-of-oa-ir-libs/ Mon Feb 20 15:38:55 +0000 2012 Replying to @coblezc Thank *you* for the post! Mon Feb 20 18:02:03 +0000 2012 Replying to @alothian Congrats!!! Tue Feb 21 02:21:56 +0000 2012 Replying to @tim_laq and @ProfHacker recently had a post about teaching prep that used mise en place: http://chronicle.com/blogs/profhacker/streamlining-teaching-prep/38237 Tue Feb 21 02:57:28 +0000 2012 Replying to @tim_laq Heh. You'd have to ask @nmhouston. Tue Feb 21 03:02:45 +0000 2012 Replying to @savasavasava Hey! Where do you think you saw me? Tue Feb 21 19:51:59 +0000 2012 Replying to @savasavasava No, I did go out for lunch today, but not to Dojo; I guess that wasn't me! \(And here I was thinking I'd had a good hair day\.\) Tue Feb 21 20:29:15 +0000 2012 Replying to @savasavasava You are way too kind! Wed Feb 22 01:05:42 +0000 2012 Replying to @miriamkp and @briancroxall Aw, dude. If it's the pharma hack, I totally feel your pain. Happy to consult in a > 140 venue. Wed Feb 22 16:33:21 +0000 2012 Replying to @mkgold Hey, excellent - thanks! I'd love to hear more of how it went. Thu Feb 23 03:55:40 +0000 2012 Replying to @mkgold Wow, that's awfully nice to hear! Thanks for passing it on. Thu Feb 23 13:22:25 +0000 2012 Replying to @GeorgeOnline and @briancroxall See the Dreamhost blog: http://blog.dreamhost.com/2012/02/08/what-is-traffic-theft/ Thu Feb 23 17:07:53 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself I'm so sorry! Feel better soon. Thu Feb 23 17:08:49 +0000 2012 Replying to @GeorgeOnline Dude. I so hear that. Thu Feb 23 18:16:36 +0000 2012 Replying to @fraistat Hey, thanks! That's awfully nice. Fri Feb 24 20:45:18 +0000 2012 Replying to @katecrawford Hey, I take it you're back here among us! I'll look forward to coming up to visit again. Sat Feb 25 02:34:49 +0000 2012 RT @jryoung: Chronicle of Higher Ed's 12 top tech innovators: http://chronicle.com/article/Rebooting-the-Academy-12-Tech/130926/ // Thrilled to be included, along w/ @dancohen & others. Sun Feb 26 15:40:36 +0000 2012 Replying to @dancohen and @jimgroom Hey, backache. Very happy to be in such company. Sun Feb 26 15:46:39 +0000 2012 Replying to @footnotesrising Bahahahahaha! Sun Feb 26 15:49:35 +0000 2012 @dancohen @jimgroom Probably needless to say, that was meant to be "backatcha." Thanks, stupid Lion autocorrect for "innovating" in my tech. Sun Feb 26 15:50:53 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal Will do! Sun Feb 26 21:19:00 +0000 2012 Things I have done today: swept floors. Updated software. Brunch with friends. Now killing time until hair appt. Almost like it's a weekend! Sun Feb 26 21:40:46 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal I've just been catching up! Sounds like your talk was fab - as expected, of course. Sun Feb 26 21:43:30 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal Always happy to play a part! Sun Feb 26 21:47:38 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself Disruption is hard! Let's go shopping! Sun Feb 26 22:32:06 +0000 2012 Replying to @rochellespencer Thank you! I'm thrilled to have been included, and really excited about the things we're working on. Mon Feb 27 14:14:08 +0000 2012 Okay, that's pretty awesome. // RT @briancroxall: Which, of course, gives us the #lolfitz: http://twitpic.com/8pgdxr Mon Feb 27 16:54:47 +0000 2012 Replying to @Crepuscularsofa and @briancroxall The haircut was yesterday. The photoshoot was last week. I am unbewigged. Mon Feb 27 17:07:17 +0000 2012 Took today and tomorrow off in order to finish a ridiculously overdue article. Am making headway, so yay. #brightside Mon Feb 27 18:30:23 +0000 2012 But much of the morning was taken up with the plumbers trying to make my kitchen sink work again. Which it does, so yay. #brightside Mon Feb 27 18:30:51 +0000 2012 Replying to @CameronNeylon Our #BOAI anthem, to the tune of A. Winehouse, "Rehab": "They tried to make me sign the Big Deal, but I said, No, no, no…" Mon Feb 27 19:28:19 +0000 2012 This has been an awesome day of writing, but I'm pretty much wrung out from it now. Think I'll go read in the last of the afternoon sun. Mon Feb 27 21:11:30 +0000 2012 Replying to @shanakimball Right on! \(PS: pls to teach me, when you're done\.\) Wed Feb 29 02:00:59 +0000 2012 Replying to @samplereality I'm 3 hours behind, but I so completely approve of your dean. docs.text: Replying to @briancroxall Oh no! I'm so sorry. I hope she's not hurting too much. Thu Mar 01 11:04:50 +0000 2012 Replying to @captain_primate SIGH. Trillin bit: http://archives.newyorker.com/?i=1977-03-07#folio=084 [+] Thu Mar 01 20:57:11 +0000 2012 If you do read it, just keep saying to yourself: "1977. 1977. 1977." [-] Thu Mar 01 20:57:39 +0000 2012 Replying to @katinalynn Fascinating, isn't it? And the bit about blaming the New Critics, in the same way the turn to "theory" sometimes gets blamed... Congrats to you and your mom! Fri Mar 02 01:39:28 +0000 2012 Replying to @samplereality Woo hoo! Fri Mar 02 16:19:01 +0000 2012 Replying to @jcmeloni Oh no! I send you good getting home vibes... Tue Mar 06 14:11:39 +0000 2012 I want a task manager that can distinguish between a deadline and a date I plan to take on a task. Missing one should result in red flags. + Tue Mar 06 14:12:50 +0000 2012 The other should just result in the task being rolled forward to the next day's priority list. Tue Mar 06 14:13:08 +0000 2012 Replying to @jwolman Yeah, me too. I'm not saying I won't *want* one; it's a $$ issue. The Apple TV price point is low enough to be no problem. Tue Mar 06 14:14:16 +0000 2012 Replying to @midwinter_ Oh god yes please. Tue Mar 06 14:20:22 +0000 2012 Looking forward to watching this open peer review project develop: http://www.peerevaluation.org/. Oh well - it's a 2, and tomorrow is the big day. Blend away! Wed Mar 07 14:16:06 +0000 2012 Replying to @briancroxall Not to mention that video chat requires launching FaceTime, so you can only use it with folks signed on with an Apple id. Wed Mar 07 14:21:58 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal and @triproftri Tell me more about this need to locate your sources. Thanks, @chnm. Wed Mar 07 17:12:15 +0000 2012 Replying to @ftrain One begins to think that the persona has got to be an extremely protracted piece of performance art. Wed Mar 07 18:10:25 +0000 2012 Replying to @tcarmody Any indication of whether the new Apple TV interface is coming to existing devices as an update? Wed Mar 07 18:18:51 +0000 2012 Replying to @ftrain Hey! I might know of a book about that phenomenon! http://www.amazon.com/Anxiety-Obsolescence-American-Novel-Television/dp/0826515207/ Wed Mar 07 18:29:33 +0000 2012 Replying to @elotroalex My talks also have lots of the passive-voice version \("arguments have been made"\) . Wed Mar 07 18:30:45 +0000 2012 Replying to @tcarmody It'll dictate what you have to say? Sorta like Cyrano de Bergerac? Wed Mar 07 18:36:15 +0000 2012 Replying to @ftrain Cool; thanks! Turns a one-step process into three: duplicate, rename, move to new location. Grrrr. Wed Mar 07 21:26:15 +0000 2012 Long day. Much work. Crucial meetings. Gave talk. Now a late dinner before collapsing. Thu Mar 08 01:44:22 +0000 2012 #crappyevals "I don't think she really understood the essays we read. All she did was tear them down." Thu Mar 08 02:30:25 +0000 2012 Replying to @urbanhumanist Ooh, I got that one a lot, even in good evils. #crappyevals Thu Mar 08 02:36:22 +0000 2012 Replying to @urbanhumanist Ha! Fabulous news! Thu Mar 08 20:38:55 +0000 2012 Did I really just repair my dishwasher myself by watching a video on YouTube and then following its instructions? Why, yes. Yes I did. It turns out it was a pretty simple problem, but I'd never have attempted it myself without YouTube. Sat Mar 10 19:42:56 +0000 2012 Replying to @brettbobley I'm thinking there might be something in that idea! Sat Mar 10 19:54:03 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself Have YouTube, will travel. Rude agents. *breathe* Sun Mar 11 16:25:08 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal Weirdly, my inbox seems to have filled up with documents. I wonder what happened. Sun Mar 11 20:01:40 +0000 2012 I am NOT having a good arrival. Sun Mar 11 20:20:40 +0000 2012 Replying to @jbj Holy crap - the 8yo wound up in the crossfire? Or did the nose-bloodying trigger the swing at you? Sun Mar 11 22:56:47 +0000 2012 Replying to @jbj Good grief. I hope he's okay - and that you are, too! If you're here, please be sure to say hi! #sparc2012 Mon Mar 12 13:44:39 +0000 2012 Replying to @LibSkrat Wait- while you're there? Does that mean you're not here? Do I continue to fail to find myself in the same room as you? #sparc2012 Mon Mar 12 13:47:54 +0000 2012 Replying to @CampusCopyright It was great meeting you, too - though it would have been better had a made a less grouchy first impression! Mon Mar 12 14:17:33 +0000 2012 Replying to @LibSkrat Ah, well. Another time! Mon Mar 12 14:50:09 +0000 2012 Absolutely brilliant keynote from @wilbanks here at #sparc2012. Lots to absorb in thinking about how to move to OA publishing models. Mon Mar 12 15:06:07 +0000 2012 Replying to @wilbanks But the gubermint is takin our properteeez! #sparc2012 Mon Mar 12 16:48:43 +0000 2012 RT @nowviskie: Excited about @kfitz's "Planned Obsolescence" talk at @ScholarsLab on Thursday! @sivavaid is her respondent. http://t.co/ ... Some boy band is staying in the W, as witness the mob of teen girls lining my side of the street. Fri Jun 22 03:01:43 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself and @jenhoward It's way better than the headline suggests. A focus on systemic problems; not saying "don't bother trying." Fri Jun 22 03:36:39 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself and @jenhoward This is not to say that the stiff drink might not be warranted. Fri Jun 22 03:37:01 +0000 2012 The most awesome thing about finding myself on the west coast is going to bed at 9 and waking up at 5, ready to go. Fri Jun 22 12:36:42 +0000 2012 RT @dancohen: In the open review meetings, we actually discussed the importance of not producing something that's a refrigerator-toaster. Fri Jun 22 14:22:19 +0000 2012 In which I whine about one of the more troublesome aspects of travel: Showers of the World. http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/blog/showers-of-the-world/ Fri Jun 22 15:17:19 +0000 2012 Hearing fantastic project presentations at #ucladh today. Very exciting movement of material & questions across multiple platforms & tools. Fri Jun 22 18:46:07 +0000 2012 Two weeks, three countries, five talks, three panel discussions. Done. My brain shall very soon begin a nice long vacation. Fri Jun 22 18:48:59 +0000 2012 Replying to @ryancordell "For best results, do not stack the computers" = the tech version of the doctor joke punchline: "Then don't do that." Fri Jun 22 19:05:01 +0000 2012 Replying to @LibSkrat Very interesting! \(Though we will always need to acquire theme park rights for everything in PMLA, of course\.\) Fri Jun 22 22:11:42 +0000 2012 Replying to @brettbobley and @toddpresner They are delish! Thanks, NEH! Fri Jun 22 22:22:08 +0000 2012 Replying to @brettbobley, @toddpresner and @ucladh Exactly! And there was Nashville in-between. I head back to Europe tomorrow. Sat Jun 23 00:23:52 +0000 2012 Replying to @mariabustillos Have great table; see you soon! Sat Jun 23 00:29:07 +0000 2012 Replying to @noctambulate Like a dinner party s/he was afraid no one would show up to! Sat Jun 23 03:17:29 +0000 2012 LAX, again. Today into tomorrow: EWR, FRA, PRG. Then three weeks of blissful stillness. Sat Jun 23 12:59:22 +0000 2012 Additional good news: yesterday, I managed to get out of the center seat they had me in for EWR > FRA. Exit row window FTW! Sat Jun 23 13:00:17 +0000 2012 Las Vegas. Unscheduled stop for medical emergency. My heart goes out to the gentleman and his wife. Sat Jun 23 16:03:22 +0000 2012 Could somebody with access to a proper size screen let me know if there's a way to get from terminal C to B at EWR w/o leaving security? Thx Sat Jun 23 17:03:06 +0000 2012 Replying to @ericdmj Okay, I'll hope that's so! All I've ever seen is the AirTrain, which is outside security. Sat Jun 23 17:07:01 +0000 2012 Replying to @ericdmj GAH. I *had* 2.5 hours. Now may not make it. Sat Jun 23 17:08:22 +0000 2012 Replying to @naypinya No, alas, AirTrain is pre-security. There's a post security shuttle bus between C & A, but I fear not B. Sat Jun 23 17:13:35 +0000 2012 Well, crap. Have just landed at EWR; connecting flight already gone. This should be fun. Sat Jun 23 22:17:20 +0000 2012 Replying to @maximolly Hi there! Will let you know should that come to pass. Sat Jun 23 22:27:25 +0000 2012 This? Is not going well. Sat Jun 23 23:39:19 +0000 2012 Replying to @savasavasava Thanks. May be home shortly. Sat Jun 23 23:48:59 +0000 2012 No seats out tonight. Am *waitlisted* for tomorrow. Sat Jun 23 23:50:01 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal Dunno. Am in line again. Sat Jun 23 23:54:35 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal is problematic. will try in a minute Sat Jun 23 23:58:41 +0000 2012 Replying to @boone It appears that I will, like it or not! Sun Jun 24 00:03:58 +0000 2012 Replying to @unsworth To Prague? Would be nice! Sun Jun 24 00:29:56 +0000 2012 Heading home. Not how I hoped this would end. Sun Jun 24 01:16:34 +0000 2012 The best part is that I get to come spend the day in the airport tomorrow waiting to see if I get on an overbooked flight off standby. Sun Jun 24 01:21:40 +0000 2012 Finally on the train headed back into the city. Home for about 13 hours: sleep, a little laundry, repack, and do it again. Sun Jun 24 02:07:46 +0000 2012 And I just realized I have no house keys. Thank goodness for the door guys. Sun Jun 24 02:22:15 +0000 2012 Belay that. I'm less stupid than I thought. Keys are safely in carry-on. Sun Jun 24 02:23:12 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself It's been a suck of a day, but I'm trying to keep it in perspective. Neither I nor a loved one had a stroke on a plane today. Sun Jun 24 02:37:47 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself Which is not to say that I'm not deeply whiny right now. And there may have been tears. Sun Jun 24 02:38:36 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself Thanks! It occurs to me that eating might be good too. Also water. All systems are screwed. Sun Jun 24 02:53:03 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself R is there waiting for me. Today was supposed to be the start of the vacation, which is part of what makes it so frustrating. Sun Jun 24 03:06:53 +0000 2012 Happy Pride, from the Terrace of Awesomeness. \(Kinda happy I didn't miss this, at the moment\.\) Sun Jun 24 03:48:04 +0000 2012 \(Only sorry the camera can't pick up the colors on the top layer of lights: should be green facing me\.\) Sun Jun 24 03:49:53 +0000 2012 Replying to @jwolman Especially when you factor in the part where I'm waitlisted for tomorrow's flights. Sun Jun 24 03:54:00 +0000 2012 Replying to @savasavasava I'm so sorry it's lingering! Hope you find some relief soon. Sun Jun 24 04:18:12 +0000 2012 It's a very weird thing to be transient in your own apartment. On the one hand, I keep thinking I shouldn't be here. + Sun Jun 24 04:20:18 +0000 2012 On the other, it's like a second chance at packing. I keep thinking of things I can grab to make the next four weeks better! Sun Jun 24 04:21:13 +0000 2012 Okay, 9 am. Laundry done, mail sorted, devices recharging. A few last things to repack. Will head back to the airport early, I think. Sun Jun 24 12:52:46 +0000 2012 \(Considering the starting point of the Pride parade lies directly between me & Penn Station, earlier is probably better\.\) Sun Jun 24 12:53:39 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal Probably your best option! Sun Jun 24 12:56:28 +0000 2012 Replying to @savasavasava So glad to hear that! Sun Jun 24 14:55:23 +0000 2012 Penn Station achieved. Next stop, EWR, and lots of waiting. Cross your fingers for me! Sun Jun 24 15:34:43 +0000 2012 Replying to @academicdave If only I had a choice in the matter. \(See last night's stream\.\) Sun Jun 24 15:37:12 +0000 2012 Replying to @academicdave Exactly. There's now a shuttle btw C & A, but B remains isolated. Sun Jun 24 15:41:16 +0000 2012 Replying to @mariabustillos Thanks! Sun Jun 24 15:44:05 +0000 2012 Replying to @Ed_Raso Bought a round trip yesterday so I'm covered, thanks! Sun Jun 24 16:07:11 +0000 2012 Replying to @lwaltzer No, but it's outside security, so useless for transfers, etc. Sun Jun 24 16:08:10 +0000 2012 Replying to @mmwwah Kinda feels that way to me, too. Here's hoping it has a happy ending. And soon. Sun Jun 24 16:19:29 +0000 2012 Okay, at the airport, in a line. Deja vu, man. Sun Jun 24 16:51:21 +0000 2012 Processes thus far are not making me optimistic. First a colleague was brought in, and now a supervisor, who must rule on whether they can + Sun Jun 24 17:01:58 +0000 2012 "accept" me on this flight. Plus a request for my paper ticket \(do they still issue those?\) . Heart not exactly filled with light here. Sun Jun 24 17:02:54 +0000 2012 Cautious optimism. Have boarding pass, but no seat. Sun Jun 24 17:12:00 +0000 2012 Replying to @eetempleton You're right; they did! Sun Jun 24 17:22:11 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal EWR to Duesseldorf to Prague, gods willing. Slept fabulously, did laundry, hung with kitties. All is okay - but really want to go! Sun Jun 24 17:24:27 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal That is a good life philosophy. Sun Jun 24 17:28:27 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal I can and will find the whiskey. Sun Jun 24 17:29:50 +0000 2012 So far, so good. Desk agent in Lufthansa lounge was sympathetic an helpful \(though he did begin with "so what happened yesterday?"\) . Sun Jun 24 18:07:59 +0000 2012 Cautious optimism continues. Plus device charging and a beverage. Sun Jun 24 18:08:33 +0000 2012 Replying to @jmittell I have at times watched that show with a discomfiting sense of familiarity. I'd probably do well, but for having to stop to tweet. Sun Jun 24 18:15:10 +0000 2012 Replying to @katinalynn Thank you! I hope your weekend is treating you well. Sun Jun 24 18:39:43 +0000 2012 Nearing the one-hour-to-flight point. The waiting is making me nervous. Sun Jun 24 19:30:03 +0000 2012 BUSINESS CLASS. \(I may weep\.\) Sun Jun 24 19:48:29 +0000 2012 Replying to @jenifer_ward and @justinpickard Thanks! Sun Jun 24 19:57:40 +0000 2012 Replying to @amandafrench Oh, no. They are too adorable! And very wise in their thinking about higher education. Sun Jun 24 20:18:01 +0000 2012 Thanks for all the support, Twitters. I'm off. More from Prague. Sun Jun 24 20:27:52 +0000 2012 Replying to @ryancordell The bar by the pool has a great menu, including a killer kale salad. Also, happy hour, 4 to 7. Sun Jun 24 21:46:58 +0000 2012 And there is wifi. Sun Jun 24 21:47:20 +0000 2012 Replying to @ryancordell It's pretty intense on the beautiful people meter, I'll admit. I sat at the bar and read. Clearly a foreigner. Sun Jun 24 21:53:53 +0000 2012 Replying to @savasavasava Is it sinus? That can last until you clear up the problem. Sun Jun 24 22:10:18 +0000 2012 Alright. 8.37pm local time here in Prague, where I arrived 12 hours ago, and where my suitcase is set to arrive any minute now. Mon Jun 25 18:38:25 +0000 2012 Not that I'm complaining! I had a lovely flight, thanks to the very nice desk agent in the Lufthansa lounge. And I'm here, which is great. Mon Jun 25 18:39:12 +0000 2012 I'm… just saying. Is all. Mon Jun 25 18:39:26 +0000 2012 Replying to @jmittell, @louisck and @samplereality Ooh, fun. It will depend on the timing; I have #MLA13 responsibilities. Tue Jun 26 05:50:18 +0000 2012 Replying to @jmittell It's hard to say. There's stuff going on more or less every night, some formal \(pres address Friday\) , some informal. + Tue Jun 26 05:55:50 +0000 2012 Replying to @jmittell My bet is that Thursday will be less busy, though. Tue Jun 26 05:56:19 +0000 2012 Resolved: Oops. Is there discussion? #UVA #BOV Tue Jun 26 19:18:51 +0000 2012 Replying to @amandafrench I think it's three necessary to call a meeting. #UVA #BOV Tue Jun 26 19:19:50 +0000 2012 "We look forward to working with President Sullivan…" #UVA #BOV Tue Jun 26 19:25:16 +0000 2012 RT @wynkenhimself: Someone retweet the lawn stream, please! #UVa // Please! The roar isn't quite reaching Prague. Tue Jun 26 19:32:43 +0000 2012 Replying to @miriamkp Yay!!! Wed Jun 27 14:57:31 +0000 2012 Those white spots out there? Swans. At least 40 of them, just hanging. Wed Jun 27 17:52:26 +0000 2012 A slightly closer view. Wed Jun 27 17:53:02 +0000 2012 R. just counted 53. #swans! Wed Jun 27 17:55:29 +0000 2012 Replying to @LizClausen Fantastic! I'll look forward to seeing the final version. Wed Jun 27 18:14:43 +0000 2012 Replying to @savasavasava Also: "SOON." Thu Jun 28 02:06:44 +0000 2012 This picture brilliantly captures my cats' personalities, once you get to know them: http://instagram.com/p/MZTXe-D0IX/ \(My caption: "SOON\."\) Thu Jun 28 16:15:26 +0000 2012 Replying to @mmwwah You read A. correctly, but you've got H. entirely wrong. He's in full non-trap rub-my-belly mode. Thu Jun 28 19:23:52 +0000 2012 Replying to @mkgold Aww! Congrats, Matt, and I hope everyone is resting well. Fri Jun 29 20:34:08 +0000 2012 Replying to @tmcphers It never is. #sigh Fri Jun 29 20:37:25 +0000 2012 Replying to @jbj How awful. I'm so sorry. Fri Jun 29 20:55:29 +0000 2012 Replying to @tmcphers I'm so glad that guy graduated from my high school. Fri Jun 29 22:38:17 +0000 2012 A new blog post, but one with more whining than substance: Not the Post I Want to Be Writing. http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/blog/not-the-post-i-want-to-be-writing/ Sat Jun 30 14:03:02 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself I thank you, and send all the positive vibes right back. Sounds like you guys are having a brutal few days on the east coast! Sat Jun 30 14:26:46 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself No kidding - I'm so glad to hear it! Sat Jun 30 14:30:01 +0000 2012 Replying to @acavender Thank you - I'm certain they will. Sat Jun 30 18:43:01 +0000 2012 Replying to @veek Are *you* going to be in Hamburg?!? I will look forward to meeting this young'un! Sat Jun 30 19:04:38 +0000 2012 Replying to @veek Excellent! Will look forward to seeing you and to meeting Nico! Sat Jun 30 19:17:38 +0000 2012 Replying to @veek Eh, I'm sure I will. Rotten timing, but teach me not to pie up business travel right before my vacation starts. Sat Jun 30 19:19:37 +0000 2012 Replying to @JenHoward and @libskrat How about in-home day care? Sun Jul 01 03:31:54 +0000 2012
docs.title: 2012 06 01 tweets

docs.text: Replying to @jmittell Safe journey, Jason. I'll look forward to hearing good things from Vermont. Sun Jul 01 18:16:40 +0000 2012 Replying to @savasavasava Yay! Nice to see them both looking so content. :) Mon Jul 02 09:49:33 +0000 2012 Replying to @savasavasava They are total love monkeys that way. It takes them a while to get comfortable, but once they do…! Mon Jul 02 12:40:03 +0000 2012 Replying to @sivavaid Are they trying to lure you out of the country for a reason? Mon Jul 02 13:55:18 +0000 2012 @radiokath Hey! Good to see you here. Mon Jul 02 15:30:00 +0000 2012 Replying to @miriamkp and @pmhswe There are some very good desk-bell style iPhone apps. Good loud "ding." Mon Jul 02 17:49:22 +0000 2012 Replying to @radiokath 100% agreed. Mon Jul 02 18:37:18 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself and @jbj Those three-character people all think they're soooo great. Tue Jul 03 15:44:48 +0000 2012 Replying to @radiokath DUDE. They were staying in the hotel across the street from me in LA, and the street was filled with screaming 15 year old girls. Tue Jul 03 19:33:43 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself AAAAAUGGGHHH!!! I'm so sorry. I send you every image of ice cubes and air conditioning I can muster. Thu Jul 05 14:32:18 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself Hey, if I can be of any help, let me know... Thu Jul 05 16:19:05 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself EXCELLENT. So pleased to hear. Do keep us posted! Fri Jul 06 17:43:15 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself PS: Hope you're enjoying the ice & a/c! Fri Jul 06 17:43:47 +0000 2012 A middle of the night announcement \(undoubtedly to be repeated later\) of part 2 of my series on Unpopular Seriality: http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/blog/the-unpopular/ Sat Jul 07 08:55:06 +0000 2012 Reposted for those of you who weren't awake at 3am eastern \(and why not, I ask you\) : The Unpopular. http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/blog/the-unpopular/ Sat Jul 07 13:30:35 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself Safe trip - and take care of yourself while you're there. Sat Jul 07 14:44:46 +0000 2012 Replying to @lportwoodstacer Thank you! Sat Jul 07 14:50:45 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself and @jmcclurken Ha! The perils of punctuation. Thanks for the link! Sun Jul 08 08:33:07 +0000 2012 Replying to @mmwwah Hey, you're on the road! Happy driving. Will look forward to hearing more. Sun Jul 08 15:18:32 +0000 2012 Replying to @mmwwah No, it's no Prague, it's true, but I am sure adventures will abound! Sun Jul 08 15:23:20 +0000 2012 Replying to @mmwwah You know, that's almost certainly true. Sun Jul 08 15:24:49 +0000 2012 One last link to this post, for those of you who took the weekend off: The Unpopular. http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/blog/the-unpopular/ Mon Jul 09 12:56:04 +0000 2012 Replying to @samplereality and @CUNYNewMediaLab Hey, thanks for the links. Here's to \(the important kind of\) popularity. Mon Jul 09 15:00:35 +0000 2012 Replying to @annehelen Hey, thanks! Your post was a very significant part of inspiring me to get back to this series. Mon Jul 09 16:22:57 +0000 2012 Replying to @annehelen I could not possibly agree with you more! Bold now \(rather than later\) produces huge benefits. Mon Jul 09 16:26:31 +0000 2012 EXACTLY. RT @annehelen: but I realized that if I waited to say anything bold or controversial until I was tenured, well, that's no way to be Mon Jul 09 16:27:01 +0000 2012 Replying to @ernestopriego Hurray! Go forth and do. Mon Jul 09 19:28:36 +0000 2012 Replying to @briancroxall The prosaically named Twitter Mentions as Comments. Mon Jul 09 19:28:54 +0000 2012 Replying to @sherah1918 Hey, nice! Thanks for the link, and the connection. Tue Jul 10 14:57:30 +0000 2012 RT @sherah1918: A. Lord's "Writing for History Buffs": http://bit.ly/Ngkf6t pairs nicely w/@kfitz's "The Unpopular" http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/blog/the-unpopular/ Tue Jul 10 14:57:39 +0000 2012 Replying to @ernestopriego What I was after was "the rich get richer," except that what they're rich in is attention paid by others. So… the former? Tue Jul 10 14:58:09 +0000 2012 I dreamed I had this printer that, if you loaded it with sheets of pancakes, would print them out with butter & syrup. #blueberrymuffinstoo Wed Jul 11 09:59:29 +0000 2012 Replying to @captain_primate That may be what provoked the dream; a listserv convo about 3D printing brought up replicators and food. \(Also was hungry\.\) Wed Jul 11 10:16:46 +0000 2012 Replying to @tcarmody #mmmwaffles Wed Jul 11 10:33:13 +0000 2012 Replying to @Ed_Raso Mmm. Replicatorific. Wed Jul 11 12:14:14 +0000 2012 Replying to @JenServenti Aw, man. Is this the future of government-procured muffins? Wed Jul 11 12:48:18 +0000 2012 RT @JenServenti: @surlyF Remember, as per @kfitz's dream \(premonition?\) , the new printer will be POD \(Pancakes on Demand\) , so no surpluses. Wed Jul 11 14:40:45 +0000 2012 RT @ernestopriego: "Lo impopular", mi traducción del artículo de Kathleen Fitzpatrick @kfitz http://humanidadesdigitales.net/blog/?p=361 #RedHD #digitalhumanit ... Wed Jul 11 17:47:30 +0000 2012 Part three in a series: Blogs as Serialized Scholarship. http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/blog/blogs-as-serialized-scholarship/ Thu Jul 12 12:41:54 +0000 2012 ICYMI, parts one \(http://www\.plannedobsolescence\.net/blog/unpopular\-seriality/\) and two \(http://www\.plannedobsolescence\.net/blog/the\-unpopular/\) . Thu Jul 12 12:42:22 +0000 2012 Replying to @ernestopriego I did, and RT'd -- thanks! Thu Jul 12 14:01:35 +0000 2012 Replying to @samplereality and @briancroxall I wonder what I'll talk about... Thu Jul 12 14:18:44 +0000 2012 Replying to @briancroxall and @samplereality Hmmm. I took a fab wine & cheese pairing class not long ago. The trick will be to focus on the serial aspect. Thu Jul 12 14:21:10 +0000 2012 Replying to @literarychica Hey, thank you! Thu Jul 12 16:17:18 +0000 2012 So @miriamkp and @JenHoward share a birthday, if I'm reading things right. Happy happy, both of you! Thu Jul 12 16:18:25 +0000 2012 Replying to @amandalicastro Hey, excellent! Thu Jul 12 19:55:05 +0000 2012 RT @koreybjackson: My DigitalCultureWeek post on @kfitz and serialized scholarship; and @kcimc's "People Staring at Computers" | http:// ... Fri Jul 13 16:17:29 +0000 2012 RT @cgbrooke: "Surreality," my riff on @kfitz's seriality posts http://www.cgbrooke.net/2012/07/13/surreality/ Fri Jul 13 18:53:30 +0000 2012 Continuing the conversation \(or at least continuing to talk about the conversation\) : Reader Response, in Theory. http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/blog/reader-response-in-theory/ Sat Jul 14 12:12:41 +0000 2012 I guess it’s about time to start packing for #DH2012. Super excited about the conference; a good bit less excited about leaving Prague. Sat Jul 14 13:59:39 +0000 2012 Ah, well. All good vacations must come to an end, I guess. Sat Jul 14 13:59:58 +0000 2012 Replying to @melissaterras I did *not* know that. Thanks! Sat Jul 14 16:02:07 +0000 2012 RT @melissaterras: Are you coming to #dh2012? Did you know there is a free conference app with all the programme details? It's fab, &amp ... Sat Jul 14 16:04:38 +0000 2012 Replying to @tcarmody and @shanakimball Do not even *begin* to speak to me about oldness, you two. #youngwhippersnappers #offamylawn Sat Jul 14 17:13:52 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself, @tcarmody, @publichistorian and @shanakimball I, on the other hand, am 600 yrs old \(or the last 6wks of travel has me feeling so\) . Sat Jul 14 17:49:23 +0000 2012 Replying to @ayjay and @tcarmody Okay, okay, it's possible I wasn't being literal. Sat Jul 14 17:57:52 +0000 2012 At the airport in Prague. Really looking forward to #DH2012 except for the whole end-of-an-amazing-vacation thing. Sun Jul 15 08:43:31 +0000 2012 Replying to @mkgold We’re missing you here, Matt! I’ll look forward to catching up back in NYC. #dh2012 Mon Jul 16 14:21:38 +0000 2012 Hey, #facsumm, on that putative decline in reading? My #mla12 talk took that on: http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/blog/networking-the-field/ //cc @wynkenhimself Tue Jul 17 06:12:21 +0000 2012 Replying to @savasavasava Ooooh. Good luck, and stay as cool as you can! Tue Jul 17 16:11:59 +0000 2012 Replying to @candrews I hope you found something by now, but if not: V Bar, on Sullivan, is awesome. \(Coffee by day, bar at evening\.\) Tue Jul 17 16:15:22 +0000 2012 Replying to @sramsay Wait - are you here? #dh2012 Tue Jul 17 16:19:11 +0000 2012 Replying to @briancroxall Down front! Tue Jul 17 16:25:48 +0000 2012 Replying to @sramsay Yay! Will look forward to saying hello in person. Tue Jul 17 16:26:30 +0000 2012 Replying to @savasavasava Excellent. I’ll hope the clouds hold! Tue Jul 17 16:26:53 +0000 2012 Replying to @briancroxall and @jasonrhody I’ll look forward to catching up at the reception! Tue Jul 17 16:28:36 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself A-and? Tue Jul 17 16:53:03 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself Okay, at least it’s still an open question. I’ll keep a good thought. Tue Jul 17 16:54:24 +0000 2012 Replying to @gennokane and @nytimes Hey, whaddaya know. Wed Jul 18 12:03:39 +0000 2012 Replying to @profwernimont, @jasonrhody and @marcgalexander I want them on a big touch-screen wall panel that will let me drill in. Wed Jul 18 12:54:45 +0000 2012 RT @rgfeal: Plan to Close University of Missouri Press Stirs Anger http://nyti.ms/SFY777 // with a quote from #MLA 's @kfitz Wed Jul 18 13:12:48 +0000 2012 Replying to @amandafrench and @gennokane I once ended up in a pic on the front page of my local’s “people” section, surrounded by scotch-tasting glasses. Wed Jul 18 14:34:07 +0000 2012 Hey, #dh2012: Have you taken up the MLA’s New Variorum Shakespeare Digital Challenge? http://www.mla.org/nvs_challenge Thu Jul 19 09:57:39 +0000 2012 Replying to @GeorgeOnline Woo-hoo! Congrats, and well-deserved! Thu Jul 19 13:01:52 +0000 2012 Replying to @jenguiliano, @trevormunoz, @rob___nelson and @jasonrhody Rats. I’m sure we can find something great. Frankly, I’d go back & have more perch. Thu Jul 19 21:12:16 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself Now that’s a double-blind peer review process I can live with. Thu Jul 19 22:04:23 +0000 2012 Replying to @savasavasava Hey, we can make arrangements for visitation. :) Thu Jul 19 22:32:20 +0000 2012 Hey, #dh2012, and particularly folks at the Online Scholarly Edition session: take up the NVS Digital Challenge! http://www.mla.org/nvs_challenge Fri Jul 20 09:25:04 +0000 2012 Replying to @ayjay Aw, man. That’s annoying. Fri Jul 20 16:10:25 +0000 2012 Replying to @ayjay Exactly. Dammit. Fri Jul 20 16:13:18 +0000 2012 “We will continue to make available our existing products, and we will provide support and critical updates to our users. + Fri Jul 20 16:21:26 +0000 2012 “However, as we’ll be busy with new projects at Google, we do not plan to release new features for the Sparrow apps.” #sigh Fri Jul 20 16:21:29 +0000 2012 Replying to @pmhswe So looking forward to having you there! \(We’re using \#mla13, by the by\.\) Fri Jul 20 21:13:55 +0000 2012 Replying to @savasavasava Those two are *totally* eating out of your hand. Fri Jul 20 21:17:32 +0000 2012 EWR. One car service away from home. Please hurry up, Mr. Car Service! Sat Jul 21 17:09:07 +0000 2012 Replying to @amyeetx I hope it all goes smoothly! Fun getting to talk with you this week. #dh2012 Sat Jul 21 17:37:03 +0000 2012 Home! Kitties! Unpacking! Yay! \(Very bad smell in the bedroom\. Booo\.\) Sat Jul 21 19:50:57 +0000 2012 Replying to @katinalynn Oh, most definitely. It is the perfect day for it, isn’t it? Sat Jul 21 19:55:58 +0000 2012 Replying to @LibSkrat No, they were closed out of there. The smell is like rotting garbage, and I cannot find the source. :( Sat Jul 21 20:01:16 +0000 2012 Replying to @wynkenhimself I intend to! No travel for… um, two week. :-/ Sat Jul 21 20:36:38 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal Nope; they weren’t in there. Smells like rotting garbage. Terrace flooded in last big storm; I fear a leak & rotting in the wall. Sat Jul 21 20:41:28 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal INDEED. Sat Jul 21 21:11:53 +0000 2012 Nine. Hours. Sleep! That was awesome. Sun Jul 22 10:08:50 +0000 2012 Making coffee in one’s own properly equipped kitchen may be the best thing ever. Sun Jul 22 10:40:55 +0000 2012 Okay, making coffee in one’s own properly equipped kitchen after NINE HOURS of sleep may be the best thing ever. Sun Jul 22 10:41:30 +0000 2012 Replying to @tcarmody Rock on. It’s one of the things I love about flying in this direction. Barely managed to keep myself awake until 9 last night. Sun Jul 22 10:43:33 +0000 2012 Replying to @tcarmody Oh yeah. Sun Jul 22 10:51:17 +0000 2012 Replying to @mmwwah and @wynkenhimself So am I - and that’s saying something! Sun Jul 22 15:22:38 +0000 2012 Very excited to be back in the office today, but think it’s going to take me a day or so to remember what I was up to before I left. Mon Jul 23 13:11:37 +0000 2012 Replying to @BryanAlexander The money & scholarships are less significant, I think, than is vacating all football victories 1998-2011. Mon Jul 23 13:36:18 +0000 2012 Replying to @BryanAlexander $60MM is something, yes - but in the land of big donors, even huge fines are just money. Vacating victories is permanent. Mon Jul 23 14:14:39 +0000 2012 Replying to @briancroxall and @BryanAlexander I suspect so, which turns every season since 1998 into an 0-and-X season. And JoePa’s record as well. Mon Jul 23 14:17:54 +0000 2012 Replying to @BryanAlexander and @briancroxall It’s a permanent reminder of the shame, which one hopes might make other programs more vigilant. + Mon Jul 23 14:24:46 +0000 2012 Replying to @BryanAlexander and @briancroxall It may also have a substantive effect on things like televised games and other kinds of support. Mon Jul 23 14:25:28 +0000 2012 The only place I think @samplereality goes wrong in his cupcake theory is insufficient attention to the power of cute. http://www.samplereality.com/2012/07/24/on-the-predominance-of-cupcakes-as-a-cultural-form/ Tue Jul 24 16:51:12 +0000 2012 @tcarmody Those release notes really were all "outta here, suckas!" Wed Jul 25 02:17:17 +0000 2012 Replying to @tcarmody Exactly. Wed Jul 25 14:40:06 +0000 2012 Replying to @nancybaym "Ta-da!" Wed Jul 25 16:59:16 +0000 2012 Replying to @tcarmody I would agree with that. The dangling carrot of perfection to come has been heartbreakingly withdrawn. Wed Jul 25 20:06:42 +0000 2012 Replying to @tcarmody Did you really go back to Mail? I hate the treatment of labels as folders - the primary thing Sparrow got right. Wed Jul 25 20:07:47 +0000 2012 There are days I love being a grownup. #thisisoneofthem Wed Jul 25 20:46:42 +0000 2012 Replying to @alicedaer and @john_carter Fuschia? Wed Jul 25 21:17:29 +0000 2012 Replying to @alicedaer and @john_carter I've known the color forever but had no idea it was named for a person. Wed Jul 25 21:21:59 +0000 2012 Passing through the EWR train station. Trying not to hyperventilate. I do not have to get on a plane. I do not have to get on a plane... Thu Jul 26 00:20:39 +0000 2012 Replying to @rgfeal I've had better and worse experiences at EWR. The hyperventilation in this case was all about Yet Another Plane. Thu Jul 26 01:14:32 +0000 2012 Replying to @jmcclurken, @chronicle, @jimgroom and @dancohen And me! Thu Jul 26 11:30:08 +0000 2012 Replying to @jmcclurken Hmph. Snubbed by the academy again. :) Thu Jul 26 11:32:22 +0000 2012 Amazing Institutes for Advanced Topics announced by @NEH_ODH today. Congrats @tanyaclement & @trevormunoz & all! http://www.neh.gov/divisions/odh/grant-news/announcing-5-new-institutes-advanced-topics-in-the-digital-humanities-july Thu Jul 26 23:20:28 +0000 2012 \(I’ve been off the twitters all day; not even going to attempt to catch up, but trying to hit the highlights\.\) Thu Jul 26 23:21:00 +0000 2012 Uh, holy crap. Thu Jul 26 23:33:58 +0000 2012 Replying to @captain_primate Just so long as I’m not in the “giant funnel cloud emerges from clouds” scene from every weather movie ever. Thu Jul 26 23:36:44 +0000 2012 Replying to @brettbobley and @JenServenti It seems to be headed pretty much due east. Thu Jul 26 23:47:34 +0000 2012 Replying to @foundhistory I was really excited to hear about it, Joseph! ;-) \(Seriously, congrats\.\) Fri Jul 27 00:45:59 +0000 2012 Replying to @BendProf It was an impressive storm, but only lasted a few minutes. Where are you that my name came up? Fri Jul 27 11:07:55 +0000 2012 Replying to @ernestopriego Hey, thanks! Fri Jul 27 13:24:53 +0000 2012 Replying to @BendProf and @jbj Aha! Hi to both of you. I’ll look forward to catching up at various meetings soon. Fri Jul 27 13:25:22 +0000 2012 Replying to @meganeabbott Fabulous column; congrats! \(Not to mention congrats on the amazing reviews the book is getting\. Looking forward to next week\!\) Fri Jul 27 13:26:23 +0000 2012 Replying to @savasavasava That’s true. But also when the weather involves dangerous wind, I can’t help but think of All That Glass. Fri Jul 27 14:02:06 +0000 2012 Replying to @meganeabbott Absolutely! I imagine your travels are still just getting started…? Fri Jul 27 14:03:14 +0000 2012 I am sooooo happy that I didn’t set my old email account to delete the messages being forwarded to my new account before the two got merged. Fri Jul 27 20:51:14 +0000 2012 24 hours later, I have eliminated all of the duplicates from my transferred mail. Now to process the non-duplicated stuff. Sat Jul 28 20:29:20 +0000 2012 A mere 2885 messages to go. *sigh* Sat Jul 28 20:35:35 +0000 2012 Think I may have finally determined that my desktop’s slowness can be cured with more RAM. Not sure why it took this long to figure out. Sun Jul 29 14:20:16 +0000 2012 Replying to @GeorgeOnline Dude, if I could order an 8GB upgrade kit for my head, I’d do it in a heartbeat. Sun Jul 29 14:23:08 +0000 2012 I am now crossing my fingers and hoping that a mere $56 investment today will help me put off purchasing a new machine for another year. Sun Jul 29 14:24:25 +0000 2012 I have inherited a standing desk. Would love any advice from those of you who have adopted them. Mon Jul 30 12:48:00 +0000 2012 Replying to @katinalynn How would one possibly work without it? :) Mon Jul 30 12:51:46 +0000 2012 Replying to @erochest I’m thinking that sitting may be a good way to break away from the screen from time to time. Mon Jul 30 12:52:34 +0000 2012 Thanks for the standing desk advice, all. Everyone seems to agree on fatigue mats and gradually increase in standing time. Will report back! Mon Jul 30 14:19:19 +0000 2012 Replying to @AnummaBrooke Ooh, nice. I’ll keep that in mind! Mon Jul 30 14:25:19 +0000 2012
