Sat Aug 10 15:22:02 +0000 2013 Got brave enough to take a peek into the storage area of doom. The situation is neither as bad as I’d feared nor as good as I’d hoped. Sat Aug 10 15:24:07 +0000 2013 Once we have sufficient shelving in the apartment, I think we’re looking at one 2-person weekend worth of work. \(But first, the shelving\.\) Sat Aug 10 15:25:03 +0000 2013 Call from vet: Kitty #1 \(who was down 4 lbs\) has hyperthyroidism; kitty #2 \(who was up 4 lbs\) is diabetic. I’m going back to bed now. Sat Aug 10 17:02:44 +0000 2013 Replying to @wynkenhimself There are many worse things they could have. But it’s going to be a big change for everybody. :( Sat Aug 10 17:07:44 +0000 2013 Replying to @Exhaust_Fumes Absolutely; could be much worse. Sat Aug 10 17:15:15 +0000 2013 Replying to @jcmeloni Yes, both. He’ll be getting a thyroid pill twice a day; she’ll be getting injected with insulin. :( Sat Aug 10 19:01:05 +0000 2013 Replying to @CJ_Daugherty Heh. They have been pretty testy around one another lately... Sat Aug 10 19:01:20 +0000 2013 Replying to @jmaxsfu Yes, it was. His symptoms read almost *exactly* like the ones listed here: http://www.2ndchance.info/hyperthyroid.htm Sat Aug 10 19:02:19 +0000 2013 Replying to @samplereality Goop! Goop would not be bad. I was given pills instead. We’ll see how well this goes. Sat Aug 10 19:03:04 +0000 2013 Replying to @shanakimball Have fun! Sat Aug 10 19:41:48 +0000 2013 Replying to @brettbobley Thanks, Brett. The vet has not suggested that yet; I’m not sure why. Pills before the nuclear option, I guess. Sat Aug 10 20:43:56 +0000 2013 Replying to @rgfeal and @brettbobley Perhaps. She also said something about needing to recheck his kidneys once his thyroid level was stable, so maybe + Sat Aug 10 21:35:39 +0000 2013 Replying to @rgfeal and @brettbobley that check needs to happen before we go nuclear? Sat Aug 10 21:36:02 +0000 2013 Replying to @MiriamEBurstein, @rgfeal and @brettbobley Whoa. That’s serious. Totally worth it if it’s a real cure, but one draws a bit of a breath. Sat Aug 10 21:46:04 +0000 2013 Another call from the vet today. After more blood work, it seems kitty #2 may not be diabetic after all. She may be pre-diabetic — or + Sun Aug 11 21:01:34 +0000 2013 it may be her kidneys. She’ll go back in for more testing on Friday. Sun Aug 11 21:02:13 +0000 2013 To add insult to injury, kitty #2 is also the one with the cone of shame. And she can’t fit her whole self & the cone in the litter box. + Sun Aug 11 21:17:20 +0000 2013 And she’s dealing with a couple of dumb hoomins who didn’t think to take the raised sides of the box off for her until after the Incident. Sun Aug 11 21:18:31 +0000 2013 Replying to @brettbobley and @unsworth Hooray! And enormous congratulations. Best news to come out of Capitol Hill in quite a while. Mon Aug 12 13:16:08 +0000 2013 Replying to @jasonrhody Please, please find a way to do that. Mon Aug 12 15:17:20 +0000 2013 Replying to @dbvisel Safe travels, Dan! I’ll look forward to hearing more from the other side. Tue Aug 13 11:50:22 +0000 2013 Replying to @dbvisel Boy, I can’t imagine how that happened. No worries — and keep me posted! Tue Aug 13 12:35:49 +0000 2013 Replying to @wilbanks THE MADNESS MUST STOP. Tue Aug 13 13:09:06 +0000 2013 Replying to @mkirschenbaum That, my friend, is a very, very good question. Also, how do we make it stop. Tue Aug 13 14:33:57 +0000 2013 New post on Planned Obsolescence: UGH. http://wp.me/s2w8Sh-ugh Wed Aug 14 13:03:50 +0000 2013 Replying to @sherah1918 JEALOUS. Wed Aug 14 23:15:24 +0000 2013 Replying to @sherah1918 PS: I am assuming you are in NOLA. Pls go get a poboy at Mother’s and tell me about it in detail. Wed Aug 14 23:20:01 +0000 2013 Replying to @sherah1918 You. Are. Killing. Me. Thu Aug 15 02:31:27 +0000 2013 Replying to @sherah1918 Sorry, I went to sleep! No, do not hush. I am living vicariously \(if longingly\) through your food life right now. Thu Aug 15 10:32:22 +0000 2013 Replying to @CJ_Daugherty Happy publication day! I hope it’s a wonderful one. Thu Aug 15 11:11:52 +0000 2013 Replying to @CJ_Daugherty \(PS: Eat it, stupid US publishers\.\) Thu Aug 15 11:12:06 +0000 2013 Replying to @LibSkrat My, these babies are both delicious and protein-rich! \(Excellent stuff\.\) Thu Aug 15 16:33:32 +0000 2013 Good read. // MT @LibSkrat “How to Scuttle a Scholarly Communication Initiative” is pub’d. Let brickbattery commence! http://jlsc-pub.org/jlsc/vol1/iss4/3/ Thu Aug 15 16:39:24 +0000 2013 Replying to @sherah1918 I am having a deeply Pavlovian response. That looks AMAZING. Thu Aug 15 19:52:03 +0000 2013 Replying to @msbonn I’ve been using Feedly, which I’ve come to like quite a lot. Fri Aug 16 14:41:35 +0000 2013 Replying to @ftrain Are you really in Industrial Complex, LA? I might be alarmed to tell you how nearby I grew up. Sat Aug 17 00:36:48 +0000 2013 Replying to @ftrain Fair enough. I’m in Brooklyn now too, so the distance from there to here is only 46ish years long. Sat Aug 17 00:40:33 +0000 2013 Replying to @ftrain YAY! Best thing anyone has said to me ALL WEEK. Sat Aug 17 00:44:14 +0000 2013 Replying to @annehelen ROCK ON, AHP. Looking forward to seeing it! Sat Aug 17 00:45:41 +0000 2013 Replying to @briancroxall You need to understand those reviews in the context of the personal lives of the reviewers, Brian. Mon Aug 19 16:42:35 +0000 2013 Finally got a chance to read my colleague Char Miller’s fantastic USETDA 2013 keynote on OA and the undergrad thesis: http://scholarship.claremont.edu/pomona_fac_pub/377/ Mon Aug 19 16:54:57 +0000 2013 Replying to @LibSkrat Absolutely. Just fantastic! Mon Aug 19 16:56:52 +0000 2013 There is at least one very good thing to be said about being in a 12-month \(rather than 9\-month\) position: no mid-August panic. Go, that. Mon Aug 19 18:50:22 +0000 2013 Replying to @LibSkrat That is what they call the worst of both worlds. Good luck! Mon Aug 19 18:53:21 +0000 2013 Replying to @acavender Less than you might think. :) Mon Aug 19 18:53:34 +0000 2013 Replying to @katinalynn Have fun! Very much looking forward to seeing you on your return, but I hope the trip is long and relaxing. Wed Aug 21 12:55:30 +0000 2013 Reporting for jury duty. Not sure what to follow that up with. Wed Aug 21 12:57:31 +0000 2013 Replying to @shanakimball Woo hoo! Hope everything goes super smoothly. Wed Aug 21 13:03:31 +0000 2013 Well, that was fast. Wed Aug 21 13:07:00 +0000 2013 Kicked out for having moved to Kings County v Wed Aug 21 13:10:37 +0000 2013 Replying to @ivovolt That’s great to hear - I hope you enjoy it! Wed Aug 21 13:16:06 +0000 2013 “You don’t have proof you moved with you? But you knew you wouldn’t be serving today.” Uh, no. No, I didn’t. Wed Aug 21 13:44:23 +0000 2013 Everything on the form & the web says “change your address like this.” Nothing says “if you’ve left NY County you’re ineligible.” Wed Aug 21 13:45:39 +0000 2013 Ah well. Bonus work day with no meetings. Wed Aug 21 13:46:03 +0000 2013 Replying to @hjoseph Whoopsie. Be safe, everybody! Wed Aug 21 14:03:33 +0000 2013 Replying to @savasavasava Jury duty! Wed Aug 21 14:03:50 +0000 2013 Replying to @savasavasava Certainly makes the next few days better, though I do believe in serving when called! Wed Aug 21 14:06:37 +0000 2013 RT @mkgold: Commons In A Box \(@cbox\) has now been downloaded over 6,000 times! http://wordpress.org/plugins/commons-in-a-box/ Many thanks to @SloanFoundation @CUNY… Wed Aug 21 15:46:10 +0000 2013 Replying to @mkgold and @cbox Congrats, you guys! So happy to be working with you. @SloanFoundation @CUNYGradCenter Wed Aug 21 15:46:30 +0000 2013 I love the salad I eat most days for lunch a whole lot more when it’s not 59 degrees in my office. Wed Aug 21 17:35:47 +0000 2013 Replying to @shanakimball NOOOOOOOO. This is wrong in so many ways! Wed Aug 21 20:55:33 +0000 2013 Replying to @shanakimball So, so sorry. I am sending good arrival vibes. Wed Aug 21 21:24:49 +0000 2013 Have taken a couple of days off just in time to reboard the kitty health rollercoaster. Kitty #1 is no longer tolerating the thyroid meds. Thu Aug 22 12:49:36 +0000 2013 So back to the vet with Kitty #1 today. Kitty #2 has reestablished normal blood sugar, though, without my doing anything. So there’s that. Thu Aug 22 12:51:10 +0000 2013 Replying to @samplereality Yup. I’m going in to ask for the ear goop today. Poor little guy. Thu Aug 22 12:51:43 +0000 2013 Replying to @jcmeloni Indeed. Thu Aug 22 13:05:19 +0000 2013 Yay, @nowviskie! // RT @CLIRnews: CLIR appoints Bethany Nowviskie Distinguished Presidential Fellow http://bit.ly/14Hu3fI Thu Aug 22 17:50:57 +0000 2013 Replying to @bukuwawa It is! Thank you! Fri Aug 23 13:31:25 +0000 2013 Furniture delivery scheduled for 10 am to 3 pm arrived at 9.45. Happily, we were home & ready, so something is going right this morning. Fri Aug 23 14:05:41 +0000 2013 \(Also, the furniture \- a dresser & nightstands built by Gothic Cabinet Craft \- is gorgeous\. So there’s that, too\.\) Fri Aug 23 14:06:37 +0000 2013 To celebrate the arrival of my new dresser, I unpacked one of the two boxes I’ve been lugging around unopened, those one from 2 moves back.+ Fri Aug 23 19:29:14 +0000 2013 It turned out to be some family pictures, some knickknacks, and a metric crap ton of costume jewelry, some of which dates back to the 90s. + Fri Aug 23 19:30:12 +0000 2013 I have sorted it into 3 categories: stuff I want to keep, stuff too junky for anyone to keep, and stuff somebody might want, but not me. + Fri Aug 23 19:30:50 +0000 2013 I now face two problems: how to manage the stuff I’m keeping, and what to do with the stuff I’d like to pass on. + Fri Aug 23 19:31:47 +0000 2013 There are worse problems. And it’s nice to be down to just that one unopened box. \(Which has stayed unopened through at least 4 moves\.\) + Fri Aug 23 19:33:18 +0000 2013 But ideas for \(a\) storage, and \(b\) redistribution of costume jewelry wealth are welcome. - Fri Aug 23 19:33:58 +0000 2013 Replying to @wynkenhimself My building has a basement, in which I have a storage space. It is currently packed to 100% capacity with book boxes. :-/ Fri Aug 23 19:39:07 +0000 2013 Replying to @jmittell Thanks, Jason! Actually, the unpacking is kind of pleasant; I’m glad to be getting the last things here settled. Fri Aug 23 20:13:06 +0000 2013 Birthday tragedy! The place around the corner from my sabbatical studio no longer has its Santa Fe Shepherds Pie on the menu! Fri Aug 23 22:51:03 +0000 2013 \(We made do with shrimp & crab enchiladas, and shrimp & crab cakes\. Not the same, but quite good\.\) Fri Aug 23 22:52:32 +0000 2013 Replying to @jcmeloni Why, thank you! Sat Aug 24 00:28:30 +0000 2013 Replying to @jasonrhody and @wynkenhimself I am so sorry I missed this exchange live. Sat Aug 24 00:29:37 +0000 2013 Replying to @miriamkp Thanks! I hope all’s well in SoCal. Sat Aug 24 00:30:33 +0000 2013 No one seems quite as panicked as I at the absence of Santa Fe Shepherds Pie. Let me recap: amazing cuts of beef & pork & veg braised + Sat Aug 24 00:32:27 +0000 2013 in Dos Equis, and topped with the world’s best mac & cheese. Seriously. AND IT’S GONE. Sat Aug 24 00:34:03 +0000 2013 Replying to @patrick_mj Thank you! Sat Aug 24 00:35:13 +0000 2013 Replying to @dancohen It is indeed. Thanks, and I hope all is well northward. Sat Aug 24 00:35:47 +0000 2013 Replying to @foundhistory Thanks, and backatcha \(but Jameson\) . Sat Aug 24 00:36:20 +0000 2013 Replying to @rgfeal It’s been a great day. I have not faced down the boxes. In due time. Sat Aug 24 00:36:59 +0000 2013 Replying to @veek Thanks, Vika! I hope all’s well with you. Sat Aug 24 11:38:46 +0000 2013 Replying to @amandafrench Whoa, that was until now a pretty silent move. Hope it’s gone well! Sat Aug 24 21:45:18 +0000 2013 Replying to @amandafrench So glad it happened! Good luck with the unpacking. Sat Aug 24 22:09:17 +0000 2013 My pals at Pomona are bringing me back this spring as part of a lecture series. I'm in some, um, daunting company. Mon Aug 26 02:50:40 +0000 2013 Replying to @samplereality and @philnel Could it really ever be otherwise? Mon Aug 26 03:04:22 +0000 2013 Replying to @tcarmody Aw, thanks! Mon Aug 26 10:22:51 +0000 2013 Replying to @rgfeal Indeed! Mon Aug 26 10:23:16 +0000 2013 Replying to @alexcho47 A good question, and a sad truth. Mon Aug 26 10:26:14 +0000 2013 Replying to @sramsay “The avg sal for a prof @ a leading research uni is abt $150K—& more than $200K at top ones like Columbia & Hvd. & that is an avg.” Mon Aug 26 12:43:34 +0000 2013 Replying to @sramsay BAHAHAHAHAHAHA. HAHA. Ha. Hmm. Mon Aug 26 12:44:09 +0000 2013 Replying to @sramsay I think I can manage plangent this morning, but civil may be a little more difficult. Mon Aug 26 12:53:10 +0000 2013 Replying to @ayjay Welcome to Texas. Mon Aug 26 16:50:10 +0000 2013 Dear orgs: If you email to get me to do something on your website, including a link right in the message is a good thing to do. Love, kfitz. Mon Aug 26 16:54:38 +0000 2013 Replying to @surlyF The one that I am subtweeting would fail, epically. Mon Aug 26 17:04:18 +0000 2013 Replying to @mkgold, @manovich, @phototrails, @zotero and @omeka_neatline Thanks for the shout out; sounds like great outreach! Mon Aug 26 17:43:20 +0000 2013 Replying to @jwolman #yousaiditdude Mon Aug 26 20:56:37 +0000 2013 Replying to @crsbecker Wow, what a story. So glad he was there for you and others! Tue Aug 27 10:56:16 +0000 2013 Replying to @polly_vecchio I just received your email; will respond when I get a clear moment! Tue Aug 27 15:26:32 +0000 2013 Replying to @stephharves Why thank you! It’s exciting but unnerving. Tue Aug 27 20:43:31 +0000 2013 It is so cold in my office that I am losing the feeling in my fingertips. I’m pretty sure my brain activity is slowing, too. Wed Aug 28 15:36:27 +0000 2013 I cannot wait for summer to end, not so that it’s less tropical outside, but so that it’s less arctic inside. Wed Aug 28 15:37:48 +0000 2013 I kid you not: I am wearing a long-sleeved top, long pants, a sweater, thick socks, and I have a blanket on my lap. And I’m still freezing. Wed Aug 28 15:38:42 +0000 2013 \(And I’m obviously hoping that complaining might generate some heat\.\) Wed Aug 28 15:39:01 +0000 2013 I have Flannery O’Connor in my head: “She would have been a good woman if it had been somebody there to shoot her every minute of her life.” Thu Aug 29 17:38:18 +0000 2013 Except in reverse: I might actually have accomplished something if there had been somebody there to tell me how every minute of my life. Thu Aug 29 17:39:12 +0000 2013 Replying to @jvinopal and @moncia Yay indeed! Thu Aug 29 20:39:25 +0000 2013 New post at Planned Obsolescence: I Am Not Blogging. http://wp.me/p2w8Sh-Fi Fri Aug 30 14:14:23 +0000 2013 Replying to @surlyF I had that same moment this afternoon. OMG, that’s a poet, top story. Sun Sep 01 02:24:30 +0000 2013
docs.title: 2013 08 01 tweets

docs.text: Hey, the chat I had with @crsbecker and @DearStefania about DH, media studies, and the state of the humanities is up: http://cultureinconversation.wordpress.com/2013/09/01/the-state-of-the-humanities-exploring-digital-humanities-and-media-studies/ Sun Sep 01 15:56:10 +0000 2013 Tonight: the famous @ProfHacker pulled pork, fresh corn, double-garlicked collards, gazpacho. A feast to send off an incredible summer. Mon Sep 02 22:01:46 +0000 2013 Replying to @jwolman I was thinking the same thing: I might be able to recover some things I had to get rid of in my last move! Tue Sep 03 14:46:26 +0000 2013 RT @4Hum: A fantastic conversation from .@kfitz, .@crsbecker, & .@DearStefania on DH, media studies, public humanities, & more: http://t.co… Tue Sep 03 15:24:02 +0000 2013 Day 2 of @ProfHacker special pulled pork; even better than the first. Thanks, @briancroxall! Wed Sep 04 01:02:50 +0000 2013 I will also note that the last two nights of Jersey corn have me wondering why I haven’t eaten an ear of corn at every meal for weeks now, Wed Sep 04 01:03:59 +0000 2013 Replying to @TheAtlantic Looks like theatln.tc has expired? Wed Sep 04 16:24:44 +0000 2013 Ahem: http://news.commons.mla.org/2013/09/04/free-mla-job-information-list-to-launch-this-month/ Wed Sep 04 19:46:49 +0000 2013 Replying to @wynkenhimself Pretty awesome, eh? I am, however, just one member of a team full of awesome here. Wed Sep 04 19:50:48 +0000 2013 RT @rgfeal: Massive applause starts with the MLA Executive Council, which made it happen. Remember this, members who vote! @briancroxall @k… Wed Sep 04 19:57:02 +0000 2013 Replying to @briancroxall Ooh, I just got to be one of the bearers of good news, is all. One member of a fab team. Wed Sep 04 19:57:51 +0000 2013 Replying to @mkgold Hey, check @briancroxall’s update: the Job List will be free to *all* users. Also, applause to the Executive Council, not me! Wed Sep 04 20:24:01 +0000 2013 Remember @wynkenhimself’s post about negotiating a better contributor’s contract? I found that post helpful today. http://sarahwerner.net/blog/index.php/2012/08/a-new-contributors-contact/ Thu Sep 05 17:41:17 +0000 2013 Also, I got soundly publishersplained about the purposes of copyright this morning. *rolls up sleeves* Thu Sep 05 17:42:24 +0000 2013 Replying to @LibSkrat It was very hard not to go back with YOU CLEARLY DO NOT KNOW WHO I AM. Thu Sep 05 18:01:35 +0000 2013 Hey, so who is #dtc375? Nice tweeting, y’all. Thu Sep 05 21:57:02 +0000 2013 Replying to @rogerwhitson, @triproftri, @briancroxall and @foundhistory Very cool exercise. My words came back with a certain alienated majesty! Fri Sep 06 02:38:44 +0000 2013 It’s been a crazy day, but full of awesome: @katinalynn has joined us here at @MLACommons! Great things will be coming your way soon. Mon Sep 09 19:48:15 +0000 2013 High of 87 today. 92 tomorrow. Early September just reminding us who’s boss. Tue Sep 10 11:46:26 +0000 2013 Also, a moment’s whining about #insomnia: being utterly awake until 4 am, despite being exhausted, does not make for a cheerful 7 am. Tue Sep 10 11:48:49 +0000 2013 Replying to @katinalynn and @karikraus I have an office sweater and an office fleece blanket. Somedays it’s still not enough. *sigh* Tue Sep 10 17:31:14 +0000 2013 Replying to @amandafrench, @nowviskie and @rgfeal I’m so sad about this. Clearly I haven’t been paying much attention lately either. Tue Sep 10 20:03:06 +0000 2013 Replying to @karikraus and @mkgold And how many others have just been drifting away. Tue Sep 10 20:09:24 +0000 2013 My day nearly concluded with a heart-stopping, eye-twitch inducing moment of thinking I’d made a colossal mistake & had no way to recover. + Tue Sep 10 21:48:34 +0000 2013 A colleague, however, has saved my bacon. #icanandwillfindthebourbon Tue Sep 10 21:49:28 +0000 2013 Mmmm. Bacon. Tue Sep 10 21:50:31 +0000 2013 Replying to @eetempleton Alas, that may *be* your super power. \(Mine is making people stroll directly into my path as I walk down the street\.\) Wed Sep 11 17:00:50 +0000 2013 RT @MLACommons: #MLA members, please share your comments about a new proposal for MLA groups at http://groupsdiscussion.commons.mla.org/. Wed Sep 11 21:22:13 +0000 2013 #MLA members: Be sure your voice is heard! Comment on the draft proposal for the future of MLA groups. http://groupsdiscussion.commons.mla.org/ Thu Sep 12 13:49:15 +0000 2013 The MLA is hiring a senior web developer. Come help shape the association’s online future! http://careers.stackoverflow.com/jobs/39656/senior-web-developer-modern-language-association Thu Sep 12 13:56:20 +0000 2013 Why revise the #MLA group structure now, what are the most significant changes, and other frequently asked questions: http://groupsdiscussion.commons.mla.org/faq/ Thu Sep 12 14:03:36 +0000 2013 Replying to @miriamkp Very cool! Congrats! Thu Sep 12 17:53:52 +0000 2013 For the p.m. crowd: The MLA is hiring a senior web developer. Come help shape the association’s online future! http://careers.stackoverflow.com/jobs/39656/senior-web-developer-modern-language-association Thu Sep 12 19:34:15 +0000 2013 Fantastic visit to Lehigh U today. Very excited to hear how the English department is imagining its work. Fri Sep 13 01:06:20 +0000 2013 Replying to @jenna_lay Fantastic talking with you as well! Thanks for a great discussion. Fri Sep 13 18:02:29 +0000 2013 Just ended an excellent visit to Lehigh U; heading on to Rochester for #decodingURoch! Fri Sep 13 18:03:33 +0000 2013 That whole going to Rochester thing? May have spoken too soon. Fri Sep 13 19:16:50 +0000 2013 This situation just continues to improve. Fri Sep 13 19:51:06 +0000 2013 Replying to @surlyF C’est moi. Fri Sep 13 19:58:19 +0000 2013 Replying to @lnakamur I was supposed to be in at 5. Will now not be in until 10. May not make it to breakfast, but will keep you posted. Fri Sep 13 19:59:21 +0000 2013 Prepare for a barrage of whining. Fri Sep 13 20:03:52 +0000 2013 1. Flight from ABE to PHL delayed due to unspecified mechanical issues. Will miss connection to ROC. Booked on next ROC flt, 5 hours later. Fri Sep 13 20:07:05 +0000 2013 2. Flight from ABE to PHL continues to be delayed, so much so that they’ve hired a bus to drive us there instead. Everybody to ticketing. Fri Sep 13 20:08:39 +0000 2013 3. Everyone told to leave ticketing and get on bus. Which is nowhere in evidence. Fri Sep 13 20:09:27 +0000 2013 4. Bus, once it does manifest, will head into rush hour traffic. But at least my connecting flight isn’t until 9.30 pm, right? #brightside Fri Sep 13 20:11:26 +0000 2013 For all that, thanks, @USAir. Fri Sep 13 20:11:59 +0000 2013 Replying to @JMarkOckerbloom Happily \(for some values of happily\) I am now in a bus. Thanks, though! Fri Sep 13 20:23:11 +0000 2013 Replying to @rgfeal and @usair Am supposed to be in ROC tonight; talk tmw morning. Fri Sep 13 20:26:27 +0000 2013 Replying to @elotroalex Backatcha. Fri Sep 13 20:28:47 +0000 2013 Replying to @mckenziewark Are you leaving, too? Sorry I’ll miss you, if so! Fri Sep 13 20:34:28 +0000 2013 Replying to @BenRobertson Indeed! Fri Sep 13 20:34:54 +0000 2013 Hello, Philadelphia. Did not think I would see anything but your airport today. Fri Sep 13 21:10:36 +0000 2013 A-and, we’re stopped. 12 miles to go. Fri Sep 13 21:21:13 +0000 2013 WHY AM I STILL IN A VAN. Fri Sep 13 21:53:25 +0000 2013 Replying to @wilbanks Oh please don’t tell me I have to live in this thing with all 13 of these people. Fri Sep 13 22:00:25 +0000 2013 Replying to @brettbobley Did they at least rubberband a laser pointer to it? Fri Sep 13 22:16:51 +0000 2013 I am out of the van. 3 minutes curbside to Legal Seafood. Thanks, TSA Precheck! Fri Sep 13 22:17:29 +0000 2013 Replying to @sleonchnm Heck yeah. And a crab cake on the way. Fri Sep 13 22:25:59 +0000 2013 Replying to @JenServenti and @brettbobley There's a requisition form for that. See you in six months. Fri Sep 13 22:31:35 +0000 2013 ROC. At last. Sat Sep 14 02:36:48 +0000 2013 Replying to @mkirschenbaum cf. David Foster Wallace. Sat Sep 14 14:20:24 +0000 2013 This is not something I hear every day. RT @RYDROPONiC_311: @kfitz you Virginian piece of shit what happened to the rap game Sun Sep 15 02:09:45 +0000 2013 Replying to @shanakimball I know. I’ve just let things slide. The day job got in the way. Sun Sep 15 02:16:28 +0000 2013 Replying to @tcarmody and @shanakimball Hell yeah. Sun Sep 15 02:56:08 +0000 2013 At ROC, headed home. I am hopeful that travel whining today will be minimal. *knocks wood* Sun Sep 15 13:54:41 +0000 2013 Rhet-comp & writing studies folks: the MLA very much wants to hear from you in the discussion of the draft groups proposal on @MLACommons. + Mon Sep 16 12:04:06 +0000 2013 The document is very much a draft, and your input can play a huge role in shaping how your fields are represented: http://groupsdiscussion.commons.mla.org/draft-proposal/#comment-233 Mon Sep 16 12:04:11 +0000 2013 #MLA members: If you haven’t yet, be sure to read the FAQ on our groups discussion. Important info therein! http://groupsdiscussion.commons.mla.org/faq/ Mon Sep 16 17:26:47 +0000 2013 Replying to @MichaelHancher Could you report via feedback/ticketing system? Brown button at right edge. Mon Sep 16 20:31:00 +0000 2013 RT @jenna_lay: Loved reading @LKremmel's thoughtful response to @kfitz's recent visit to Lehigh: http://www.nassrgrads.com/online-academics-questions-for-grad-students Tue Sep 17 20:41:27 +0000 2013 Replying to @CJ_Daugherty Go, you! \(“CJD? She’s very big in Germany\.”\) Wed Sep 18 11:06:45 +0000 2013 RT @MLACommons: We are happy to announce round two of the #MLA New Variorum Shakespeare Digital Challenge! http://news.commons.mla.org/2013/09/18/the-new-variorum-shakespeare-digital-challenge/ Wed Sep 18 19:55:40 +0000 2013 Replying to @amandafrench, @MLACommons and @patrick_mj We would never. Wed Sep 18 19:56:24 +0000 2013 If detailed for you the levels of my coffee-making FAIL today, you would not believe me. I should never travel without my Aeropress again. Thu Sep 19 12:22:29 +0000 2013 Replying to @plragde That is criminal. Thu Sep 19 12:30:44 +0000 2013 Take away my digital media scholar credentials if you like, but -- I don't get all the iOS 7 hate. I'm mostly digging it so far. Thu Sep 19 15:27:08 +0000 2013 I'm actually trying to get myself to use the native apps for a few weeks, to see how I feel about them. So far, so good, except: + Thu Sep 19 15:27:58 +0000 2013 Gmail labels, for crying out loud. How many years has it been? SHOW THEM, MAIL. Thu Sep 19 15:28:30 +0000 2013 Replying to @wynkenhimself I hear you about the dock. To close apps: double tap the home button as before, then swipe up on the app you want to close. Thu Sep 19 15:38:55 +0000 2013 Replying to @moncia Gatekeeper! I'm being gatekept! Thu Sep 19 16:07:33 +0000 2013 Okay, and a plea to the native Twitter app: sync my place in the timeline across devices, pls pls pls. Thu Sep 19 16:09:33 +0000 2013 In the category of things iOS7 gets right: the newsstand is no longer treated as an application independent of publications. At last. Thu Sep 19 16:47:50 +0000 2013 Replying to @wynkenhimself I'll trade that for not having to force quit it all the time. Thu Sep 19 16:52:08 +0000 2013 Replying to @acavender Me too. This iteration of the native app experiment may not last. Thu Sep 19 16:53:31 +0000 2013 Talk 1 of 2 at Cornell University today is about to begin! Thu Sep 19 19:54:02 +0000 2013 Replying to @cgbrooke I know! We should rectify that. Thu Sep 19 21:25:51 +0000 2013 I can tell already: Twitter will be the first native app I abandon. #ios7 Fri Sep 20 01:20:05 +0000 2013 Replying to @CGSaw I've used Tweetbot a while & love it. The Twitter thing is part of my "test out new native apps & see if I still hate them" plan. Fri Sep 20 01:35:32 +0000 2013 Replying to @CGSaw Exactly. I'm liking Mail this go-round, and would totally stick with it if it could deal with Gmail labels properly. Fri Sep 20 01:43:15 +0000 2013 Gave two talks yesterday. Up at 4 today to fly ITH > EWR > IAH > BTR for my grandmother's 90th birthday. Both cases: exhausting but fun! Fri Sep 20 08:42:04 +0000 2013 Cab is 25 minutes late picking me up. I am now in a ridiculously long and slow security line. This is not how I want to start this day. Fri Sep 20 09:40:05 +0000 2013 Replying to @alicetiara Ithaca! 3 gates, 1 security lane, 20 mins. Am through now though! Fri Sep 20 09:54:33 +0000 2013 As of this very moment, I have 4,747 followers. My former students will know why I noticed. Fri Sep 20 11:04:20 +0000 2013 Replying to @patrick_mj Ooh. A question we hadn’t considered. Let me get back to you! Sat Sep 21 00:07:53 +0000 2013 Wonderful 90th birthday party today for my grandmother! Now hoping my trip home goes smoothly so I’m on time for tmw’s program cte meeting. Sun Sep 22 21:25:58 +0000 2013 The other thing it wd be nice to have in control center in iOS7: your next boarding pass. Swipe up from any screen & voila: less fumbling. Sun Sep 22 21:29:44 +0000 2013 Replying to @beautyislikeyea Yes! I have that set. What I want is to be able to swipe up from any other app & get to a boarding pass with one thumb. Mon Sep 23 03:15:41 +0000 2013 Replying to @sheepeeh Yay! Congrats! Mon Sep 23 11:37:29 +0000 2013 RT @m_b_schlosser: Self RT for the Monday crowd: My book selection for the faculty recognition program: @kfitz's Planned Obsolescence. http… Mon Sep 23 13:17:32 +0000 2013 Replying to @m_b_schlosser SUPER COOL. Thank you so much for the selection. Mon Sep 23 13:17:58 +0000 2013 RT @jasonrhody: Plotting out my MLA panel matrix thanks to @samplereality's fab annual list of DH sessions: http://www.samplereality.com/2013/09/19/digital-humanities-at-mla-2014/ Grateful… Mon Sep 23 15:35:58 +0000 2013 RT @samplereality: "All those who mock academic labor" contribute to the impoverishment—and death—of adjuncts. - @philnel http://t.co/JdYxC… Mon Sep 23 21:33:16 +0000 2013 Replying to @shanakimball It’s very weird profile. Tue Sep 24 01:19:27 +0000 2013 Replying to @shanakimball It’s *a* very weird profile, I mean. Tue Sep 24 01:19:53 +0000 2013 Replying to @shanakimball and @ayjay So much hostility. Eileen Fisher doesn't know how to draw. Or sew. And she mistreats her cat! Tue Sep 24 01:41:07 +0000 2013 RT @MLACommons: 200+ presidential theme sessions at #mla14! Tell us about yours to have it featured on the @MLAconvention blog: http://t.co… Tue Sep 24 15:35:27 +0000 2013 So, so much to think about in here: http://frankchimero.com/blog/2013/09/the-inferno-of-independence/ Wed Sep 25 10:55:30 +0000 2013 Cold. Fingers numb. Brain activity slowing. Cannot last much longer. Tell my children I love them. Wed Sep 25 15:17:52 +0000 2013 \(Seriously, building: it’s 65 degrees outside\. TURN OFF THE AIR CONDITIONER\.\) Wed Sep 25 15:18:18 +0000 2013 Replying to @tcarmody and @fchimero I haven’t, but really want to. Let’s do something, please. Wed Sep 25 17:24:20 +0000 2013 Am in Dumbo for the first time since probably 1994 and am experiencing MASSIVE cognitive dissonance like whoa. Wed Sep 25 22:03:30 +0000 2013 One of my clearest memories here is of walking past a burning car between the subway and my friend’s. 10.30am Sunday; no one for blocks. Wed Sep 25 23:05:47 +0000 2013 Replying to @Exhaust_Fumes SERIOUSLY. There’s a West Elm. Wed Sep 25 23:15:34 +0000 2013 Replying to @miriamkp Ooh, I missed your announcement earlier! Huge congrats again, and very glad it’s official! Thu Sep 26 02:06:42 +0000 2013 Replying to @stephharves No kidding! Where are the burning cars of yesteryear? Thu Sep 26 10:47:34 +0000 2013 About to begin a two-day meeting with the fabulous & incredibly hard-working #MLA Publications Committee! Thu Sep 26 13:21:32 +0000 2013 Replying to @karikraus Whoa, awesome. congrats! Thu Sep 26 21:25:57 +0000 2013 Replying to @shanakimball You missed mine at the UNT meeting! \(I can’t swear that it’s a good example, though; you’d have to ask others about that\.\) Fri Sep 27 17:48:36 +0000 2013 Replying to @shanakimball I might be able to do that... Fri Sep 27 17:50:52 +0000 2013 Replying to @shanakimball and @jbrittholbrook Me & the mice, we’re totally getting down. \(Srsly, thanks\.\) Fri Sep 27 17:52:47 +0000 2013 Replying to @shanakimball FYI, the conf website says videos are forthcoming? http://openaccess.unt.edu/symposium/2013 Fri Sep 27 17:54:16 +0000 2013 Replying to @JenHoward That's fantastic! Congratulations to him. Sat Sep 28 01:58:31 +0000 2013 Note to self: I know you haven’t had your coffee yet, but try to remember that the filter is a non-optional component of the Aeropress. Sat Sep 28 12:31:50 +0000 2013 Replying to @plragde There was this moment of pure bafflement as coffee and grinds came flooding out into my cup and over my countertop. Sat Sep 28 12:41:47 +0000 2013 Replying to @bantic I absolutely love it. Best and most consistent coffee I’ve made at home. Plus ridiculously easy cleanup. Sat Sep 28 13:08:07 +0000 2013 Replying to @moncia, @jvinopal, @mkgold, @elotroalex and @nycdh Very sorry not to be there with you today; crazy meeting/travel schedule demands a day at home. Sat Sep 28 14:13:14 +0000 2013 Replying to @moncia, @RayS6 and @nytimes I’m sorry this one isn’t included as part of that series! http://www.nytimes.com/2010/08/24/arts/24peer.html?smid=pl-share Sat Sep 28 14:21:57 +0000 2013 Replying to @miriamkp I NEED DIS. http://ineeddis.com/ Sat Sep 28 15:54:56 +0000 2013 Replying to @rgfeal and @ProfM_Lindemann I don't have cable & have been doing this all season. If you use Tweetbot you can mute keywords & hashtag at least. Sat Sep 28 20:57:07 +0000 2013 Replying to @ProfM_Lindemann Congratulations! Well deserved. Sat Sep 28 20:58:13 +0000 2013 Replying to @kylebeachy So sorry to hear you’re injured! Glad to know you’ve got good support. Take care! Mon Sep 30 15:03:25 +0000 2013 At LGA. This week’s itinerary: MSP for an @ARLnews workshop; ORD for the Dean’s Lecture at Columbia College. Hope to see some of you! Mon Sep 30 15:06:03 +0000 2013 Replying to @jmittell Hey, s/he’s communicating. Openly and transparently. Mon Sep 30 15:07:36 +0000 2013 RT @sherah1918: To all of my colleagues and friends who work federal jobs: thank you for what you do all year. I hope you get to do those t… Mon Sep 30 22:45:48 +0000 2013 Thinking a lot tonight about all my friends who work for the government. Wishing for better times for us all. Tue Oct 01 02:15:23 +0000 2013
docs.title: 2013 09 01 tweets

docs.text: Replying to @melissaterras Congratulations, Melissa — I hope it’s a great day! Tue Oct 01 10:47:55 +0000 2013 Sending all my best thoughts today to my friends at @NEH_ODH and elsewhere in the government. Thank you for everything you do on our behalf. Tue Oct 01 13:24:31 +0000 2013 Replying to @brettbobley Here’s hoping you get to enjoy the vast majority of the month back in the office. Tue Oct 01 17:53:54 +0000 2013 Replying to @brettbobley I did not! The things a person can discover. Tue Oct 01 17:58:51 +0000 2013 RT @MLACommons: Go beyond prepared papers at #mla14 with dynamic, innovative session formats: http://convention.commons.mla.org/?p=250. How are you structuri… Tue Oct 01 20:05:11 +0000 2013 Replying to @ayjay and @tcarmody Indeed! I will hope for awesome things ahead. Tue Oct 01 21:19:11 +0000 2013 Replying to @tcarmody and @shanakimball Hey, excellent! We will have to introduce you to our favorite bars. Um, places. I mean places. Tue Oct 01 22:43:03 +0000 2013 Replying to @tcarmody and @shanakimball Appropriate and family friendly. Tue Oct 01 22:43:56 +0000 2013 Replying to @tcarmody and @shanakimball Dude, I live in Park Slope. I’ve been in bars where there were more people under 5 than over 21. Tue Oct 01 22:45:53 +0000 2013 Replying to @tcarmody, @atrubek and @shanakimball Awesome. Tue Oct 01 22:46:08 +0000 2013 Hello, Chicago! I’m giving the Dean’s Lecture at Columbia College this evening. Hope to see some of you there. Wed Oct 02 14:53:17 +0000 2013 Replying to @amandafrench and @NEH_ODH :( Wed Oct 02 15:12:22 +0000 2013 Ridiculously gorgeous early October day here in Chicago. Surprised the House hasn’t found a way to shut this weather down. Wed Oct 02 15:23:34 +0000 2013 Yes. // RT @ekansa @amandafrench I don’t know what to say. I’m so sorry about @NEH_ODH and, though this sounds corny, the whole country. :( Wed Oct 02 15:24:49 +0000 2013 My former student who is a House staffer is dutifully reporting - unpaid - from the Hill. Wed Oct 02 15:28:50 +0000 2013 14 House R’s now publicly support the Senate’s clean CR. Bring it to the floor, Boehner. Let our government work. Wed Oct 02 15:30:32 +0000 2013 Replying to @wynkenhimself Oh, @beccarosen only got to see *some* of the best stuff. I see no reference to suffering Her Majesty’s grievous indignation. Wed Oct 02 19:48:56 +0000 2013 Replying to @wynkenhimself and @briancroxall Not that I recall… but migraines do funny things to my memory. Wed Oct 02 22:24:56 +0000 2013 Replying to @briancroxall and @wynkenhimself Thanks for the link; good to know! Thu Oct 03 01:11:12 +0000 2013 Replying to @briancroxall and @wynkenhimself Excellent! Thu Oct 03 01:11:53 +0000 2013 Compelling questions about design today: “All Technology Is Assistive Technology.” https://medium.com/thoughtful-design/a8b9a581eb62 Thu Oct 03 01:40:45 +0000 2013 Replying to @ayjay and @ablerism Good to know - thanks! Thu Oct 03 01:42:35 +0000 2013 In the last three weeks: Bethlehem-Rochester-home; Ithaca-Baton Rouge-home; Minneapolis-Chicago-home. Thu Oct 03 13:24:36 +0000 2013 For this week’s adventure, Tripit just informed me that my flight home has been cancelled. Thu Oct 03 13:26:12 +0000 2013 I’m rebooked two hours later, thank goodness. But I am nonetheless feeling quite whiny about it all. I just want to go home. Thu Oct 03 13:27:34 +0000 2013 And I am trying very hard not to ponder what adventure next week’s Oxford-Fairfax-home will bring. Thu Oct 03 13:28:29 +0000 2013 Replying to @sbmalley Thank you! It was great getting to talk a bit. Thu Oct 03 13:37:43 +0000 2013 Replying to @trauman Thank you! It was a great conversation. So back we go to the vet this morning. #sad Mon Oct 14 14:16:39 +0000 2013 Replying to @mmwwah He thinks, therefore he is. Mon Oct 14 14:19:18 +0000 2013 Replying to @GWCChuck Thanks for the good wishes — and all best to you and your little one. Mon Oct 14 14:26:27 +0000 2013 Today will be spent in part awaiting test results on Kitty #2. In-office tests were inconclusive, as I suspect the sent-out tests will be. Tue Oct 15 10:05:25 +0000 2013 Everything continues to suggest diabetes, though her blood glucose was only a hair outside the high end of normal. But we’ll see. Tue Oct 15 10:07:29 +0000 2013 Replying to @GeorgeOnline and @eetempleton Thanks for the good thoughts! Tue Oct 15 12:37:40 +0000 2013 Replying to @ncecire The good news is that then @brettbobley will be able to deal with it in its entirety, rather than at the molecular level. Wed Oct 16 16:47:59 +0000 2013 Replying to @rrkennison, @GeorgeOnline and @eetempleton Nothing yet, which is aggravating. Another scary moment with her yesterday. Really want answers. :( Wed Oct 16 19:16:49 +0000 2013 Replying to @eetempleton, @rrkennison and @GeorgeOnline No kidding! It’d make things a lot simpler. Though cats are sneaky and like to pretend they’re fine. Wed Oct 16 19:29:18 +0000 2013 Totally effing inconclusive test results on Kitty #2 again. Now running another test, and if that’s inconclusive, we’re on to an ultrasound. Wed Oct 16 21:05:06 +0000 2013 So happy for my fed friends that they can get back to doing the important work they’re committed to. Thanks to them for hanging in there. I’m not suggesting universities don’t need to reconsider priorities. But those shiny things are coming at the expense of + Wed Oct 23 13:07:46 +0000 2013 Replying to @maitri having a stable, full-time faculty. So absolutely, those things need examination. docs.text: Abby Smith Rumsey refers to my talk yesterday in opening today’s first #2013wha session, and makes me sound way smarter than I am. The pre-conv workshop will be back in the future, though! My apologies, #2013wha, but I’m about to have to split. It’s been fun! Fri Nov 01 23:57:25 +0000 2013 All but blind in my left eye. weirdly dissociated from my left hand. opening that Maxalt may be one of the hardest things I’ve done lately. But sinuses still very unhappy. Sat Nov 02 02:51:08 +0000 2013 Replying to @2xlp Hope you're feeling better! Sat Nov 02 02:51:22 +0000 2013 Okay. Post-migraine hangover, but at least it’s *post*-migraine, which should make flying home today bearable. Sat Nov 02 11:10:12 +0000 2013 Replying to @seth_denbo Wishing you smooth travels and a great start to the new gig! Sat Nov 02 11:27:46 +0000 2013 Replying to @candrews “This is really more of a comment than a question…” Sat Nov 02 18:57:33 +0000 2013 Plane landed half an hour early. Happily, that just gave me more time to wait on the NJ Transit platform. Sat Nov 02 19:03:43 +0000 2013 Slept like a rock last night. Puttered all day today. Got almost all the pictures hung, plus gumbo on the stove. All’s right with the world. Sun Nov 03 22:26:25 +0000 2013 Replying to @tcarmody Aw, man. My flight yesterday was still all device policey. My commute from Park Slope is 10 minutes faster than it was from Murray Hill. **boggles** Wed Nov 06 15:38:20 +0000 2013 Replying to @surlyF Hey, I made exactly that joke to @moncia a couple of weeks ago. Wed Nov 06 15:57:06 +0000 2013 Replying to @surlyF and @moncia I will happily deploy a CC-BY license. Will joke for credit! Wed Nov 06 19:28:09 +0000 2013 Replying to @commish24 *waves back* Wed Nov 06 19:35:36 +0000 2013 Replying to @jwolman Perhaps reading a 1000-page epic \(vol 5 of unknown\) might have helped. Wed Nov 06 23:05:12 +0000 2013 Replying to @djp2025 Had an awesome dinner at Fleet Landing tonight. Tomorrow: Husk! Thu Nov 07 02:08:35 +0000 2013 Replying to @radiokath Wow. That’s a night. Thu Nov 07 02:58:29 +0000 2013 @radiokath The only thing I can compare it to is that in high school I briefly dated the guy who went on to create the series “Hung.” Thu Nov 07 03:00:08 +0000 2013 @radiokath It took me a bit to recover, the first time I saw the credits. Thu Nov 07 03:00:53 +0000 2013 Replying to @radiokath I know, right?!? Thu Nov 07 03:06:48 +0000 2013 Replying to @mrgunn, @rrkennison and @MLACommons is openly readable; membership is required to publish or comment. One joins in order to participate. Thu Nov 07 16:34:47 +0000 2013 Replying to @rrkennison and @jenica26 One problem there is that the economics of printing fewer copies don’t quite balance out. Thu Nov 07 16:36:51 +0000 2013 Replying to @rrkennison and @jenica26 That said, it is one of the models we have under study. Thu Nov 07 16:37:47 +0000 2013 Replying to @Markings and @sandy I’m not sure I’d say they’re not *necessary.* I would say I wouldn’t number it among their primary forms of value they add. Thu Nov 07 18:41:31 +0000 2013 Replying to @Markings and @sandy Agreed! I’m not suggesting that we get rid of the current system entirely and for all communities and forms. Different + Thu Nov 07 20:43:47 +0000 2013 Replying to @Markings and @sandy kinds of review serve different purposes. What I was arguing was that “we provide peer review” is not the most effective + Thu Nov 07 20:44:16 +0000 2013 Replying to @Markings and @sandy means for UPs to declare the value they add in the publishing process. There are many more important things that can only + Thu Nov 07 20:44:55 +0000 2013 Replying to @Markings and @sandy be provided by a press. Thu Nov 07 20:45:02 +0000 2013 I just remembered: I dreamed the other night that I had a new toiletry kit. I was very excited about it. I am super curious what it means. Thu Nov 07 21:29:52 +0000 2013 Replying to @plragde Maybe I need a new one. Thu Nov 07 21:32:37 +0000 2013 Replying to @scottrettberg Ooh, excellent. Thu Nov 07 22:20:35 +0000 2013 Replying to @amandafrench Ha! Thu Nov 07 22:21:10 +0000 2013 Replying to @amandafrench and @shanakimball I wonder why I would be having one of those. I’ll hope to come back soon with less work to do! Sat Nov 09 15:02:34 +0000 2013 Dear gate agents everywhere: my tiny tote bag and normal sized purse are together smaller than the things you allow as “personal items.” + Sat Nov 09 15:50:44 +0000 2013 Making me stop and stuff one inside the other in order to reduce my item count to 2 is a pointless exercise of power. + Sat Nov 09 15:51:45 +0000 2013 And blaming the TSA is nonsense. They just saw in great detail exactly what I’m carrying, and let me through without comment. </rant> Sat Nov 09 15:52:58 +0000 2013 Replying to @mikejolk Too true. Wed Nov 13 22:49:48 +0000 2013 Just found out that a treasured former colleague died last night. Far, far too young. Have an acute need to go find everyone and hug them. Wed Nov 13 22:56:10 +0000 2013 After the night I’ve had \(bad news piled upon bad news\) I hope you people will forgive the following: Thu Nov 14 02:08:30 +0000 2013 Fuck cancer. Thu Nov 14 02:08:58 +0000 2013 #thatisall Thu Nov 14 02:09:39 +0000 2013 Replying to @dancohen I will take you up on that. Thanks, Dan. Thu Nov 14 02:28:03 +0000 2013 Replying to @rgfeal No, no. No chance the red line has started behaving, huh? Thu Nov 14 15:53:28 +0000 2013 Replying to @jwolman Heh. Taxi it is. Thu Nov 14 15:54:33 +0000 2013 Academic author? Thinking about how to move into more public venues? You might take a look at The Thinking Writer. http://thethinkingwriter.wordpress.com/ Thu Nov 14 21:14:20 +0000 2013 Replying to @amandafrench, @jmcclurken and @digitalcampus The Authors Guild seems determined to keep that plot line going. Fri Nov 15 13:48:34 +0000 2013 HT @jcmeloni: Why You Should Spend Your Mornings In A Cave By @drake_baer http://www.fastcompany.com/3017987/bottom-line/why-you-should-spend-your-morning-in-a-cave via @FastCompany Fri Nov 15 14:11:05 +0000 2013 Like @jcmeloni, I start my days early to get a bit of cave time. Fri Nov 15 21:51:34 +0000 2013 Replying to @crsbecker Amazing. Fri Nov 15 21:54:50 +0000 2013 Replying to @katinalynn Congratulations! That’s huge. Sun Nov 17 03:54:49 +0000 2013 Replying to @miriamkp Argh, still? Do I need to bust out the censorious tweets again? Mon Nov 18 16:46:40 +0000 2013 Replying to @samplereality NOOOOOOOOOO. Mon Nov 18 19:21:47 +0000 2013 Replying to @samplereality and @wynkenhimself Wait, the Well? Or the Mason Inn as a whole? Mon Nov 18 19:23:40 +0000 2013 Replying to @samplereality and @wynkenhimself Aw, man. That’s a serious drag. Mon Nov 18 19:24:51 +0000 2013 Replying to @samplereality and @wynkenhimself No kidding. And back to the age of those scary motels out on the highway. Mon Nov 18 19:26:09 +0000 2013 Replying to @sherah1918 and @wynkenhimself Good grief! That’s terrifying. I’m glad everyone is okay. \(Sorry about the good bushes, though\.\) Mon Nov 18 20:18:33 +0000 2013 Replying to @CJ_Daugherty Particularly interesting since Brussels is in a completely made-up country. Mon Nov 18 21:25:22 +0000 2013 Replying to @CJ_Daugherty It is a rupture in the time-space continuum. Paradox is sure to follow. Mon Nov 18 21:34:38 +0000 2013 Replying to @boone “Why wasn’t I consulted???” Tue Nov 19 14:52:18 +0000 2013 The left half of my face is numb from hairline to jawline. Feeling is gradually creeping back in. I love the dentist. Wed Nov 20 17:07:54 +0000 2013 And when I say “the feeling is gradually creeping back in,” I mean by random tingling and itching. Woo. Wed Nov 20 17:13:30 +0000 2013 This has been a very long day of adding insult to injury. Just after full feeling returns to my face, dermo needs to cut something off it. Wed Nov 20 20:00:09 +0000 2013 It’s #MLA committee nomination time! Members, suggest yourself or others and help shape the organization’s future. https://www.mla.org/commsugg Thu Nov 21 20:26:27 +0000 2013 Even though they waited until after I left Murray Hill, all I can say is halle-freaking-lujah. http://firstwefeast.com/laugh/santacon-is-finally-being-banished-from-new-york-city-which-is-good-because-it-is-for-mouthbreathing-goons/ \(NB: Salty language\!\) Thu Nov 21 21:15:49 +0000 2013 Replying to @katinalynn Glad to hear the talk went well! So sorry about the rest… Sun Nov 24 02:23:24 +0000 2013 The good news is that MSY has free wifi and plentiful power outlets. Sun Nov 24 22:46:41 +0000 2013 Hey, @chronicle? You may want to check your subhead on the mobile version of the staff scholars article. Mon Nov 25 15:06:49 +0000 2013 Another day, another dentist appointment. Today, the right half of my face is benumbed. Mon Nov 25 15:23:18 +0000 2013 I thought I knew what the phrase “hit a nerve” meant. And then my dentist actually hit a nerve with the novocain this morning. Mon Nov 25 15:54:11 +0000 2013 Replying to @amandafrench and @shanakimball It was like she sent an electric current right through my tongue. Crazy. \(In a “let’s don’t do that again” way\.\) Mon Nov 25 16:01:21 +0000 2013 Hey, @chronicle? It’s the subhead here I’m talking about: http://m.chronicle.com/article/A-Move-to-Bring-Staff-Scholars/143241/ Mon Nov 25 16:13:56 +0000 2013 Replying to @briancroxall, @coblezc and @StewartVarner Wow! Thanks for letting me know — though that group’s conversations were well along before my visit. Mon Nov 25 16:26:59 +0000 2013 Replying to @katinalynn, @rgfeal and @sheratonhotels WHAT???? That’s unbelievable. Mon Nov 25 21:42:58 +0000 2013 Replying to @katinalynn, @wynkenhimself, @rgfeal and @sheratonhotels No kidding. I do too — and can see myself double-checking after this! Mon Nov 25 21:48:25 +0000 2013 Replying to @wynkenhimself and @sleonchnm Mine \(it was actually my 21st; long story\) was just before FB went wide, so there was still stuff to catch up on. Tue Nov 26 14:52:30 +0000 2013 Replying to @wynkenhimself and @sleonchnm I still plan to go to my 30th, if I can make it. I had fun seeing a few good friends at the last one. Tue Nov 26 14:53:41 +0000 2013 Replying to @wynkenhimself and @sleonchnm \(The next one is sooner than I care to admit, however\.\) Tue Nov 26 14:53:54 +0000 2013 Replying to @radiokath I’ll be sure on your behalf. Tue Nov 26 19:54:48 +0000 2013 Replying to @quinnanya Aw. What a little cornucopia! Congratulations! Tue Nov 26 21:59:47 +0000 2013 A huge pot of chicken & sausage gumbo. A mess of collard greens. Not the usual tradition, but ours. Happy holidays! Thu Nov 28 22:37:28 +0000 2013 Replying to @ayjay Ooh, yum! Thu Nov 28 22:41:21 +0000 2013 Replying to @ayjay I do know that about the cornbread! You made me want some pretty intensely; happy to return the favor, gumbo-wise. Thu Nov 28 23:04:17 +0000 2013 Replying to @plragde I could definitely go for that. Thu Nov 28 23:04:42 +0000 2013 Grateful for so much in my life today. Most of all for a holiday season in the fabulous home I get to share with R., at long last. Thu Nov 28 23:07:29 +0000 2013 Replying to @ernestopriego Ernesto, I’m so sorry for your loss. Fri Nov 29 12:33:24 +0000 2013
docs.title: 2013 11 01 tweets

docs.text: Replying to @captain_primate I know, right? I’m still trying to figure out where October went. Sun Dec 01 15:50:36 +0000 2013 This is apparently the year my warranty ran out. In the last 2 wks I’ve had 2 moles biopsied, 3 teeth rebonded & a 10-min glaucoma scare. Tue Dec 03 01:41:02 +0000 2013 The moles came back “weird-looking” \(the official diagnosis\) , the teeth are fine, and I do not actually have glaucoma. But enough already. Tue Dec 03 01:42:39 +0000 2013 Replying to @briancroxall Will they let me keep my unlimited data plan? Tue Dec 03 01:43:25 +0000 2013 Replying to @briancroxall Classy! Tue Dec 03 01:46:53 +0000 2013 Replying to @jcmeloni Dude. Am trying! Tue Dec 03 02:14:11 +0000 2013 RT @MLACommons: Wondering how to use Twitter effectively at #mla14? Guest contributor @roopikarisam shares her tips: http://convention.commons.mla.org/2013/12/03/virtual-mla-a-quick-guide-to-using-twitter-at-the-mla-convention/ Tue Dec 03 16:26:20 +0000 2013 Replying to @nancybaym I was excited when I found mine, too. There’s something great in someone valuing your work enough to make a copy of it available. Wed Dec 04 13:40:16 +0000 2013 Crucial new report from CLIR & National Film Preservation Board, LOC: The Survival of American Silent Feature Films. http://www.clir.org/pubs/reports/pub158 Wed Dec 04 14:03:21 +0000 2013 Coming to #MLA14? Join the @MLACommons group for first-time attendees to get advice and ideas. http://commons.mla.org/groups/first-time-convention-attendees/ Wed Dec 04 15:12:59 +0000 2013 Replying to @the_blochian and @MLACommons Exactly why we created the group! It’s important to have a human-sized point of entry. Wed Dec 04 15:22:49 +0000 2013 Replying to @ncecire Horrible loss. Wed Dec 04 16:31:08 +0000 2013 Devastated to hear of the passing of José Muñoz. Horrible, horrible loss. Wed Dec 04 18:45:41 +0000 2013 Replying to @rgfeal My age. Wed Dec 04 18:55:09 +0000 2013 Replying to @wynkenhimself Those are some gorgeous kittehs! Wed Dec 04 23:36:08 +0000 2013 Replying to @annehelen Watched the last three episodes over the last couple of nights and thought exactly the same thing. \(“Everybody’s happy\!”\) Thu Dec 05 02:46:36 +0000 2013 My last few weeks have been one non-stop medical complaint. Today’s whine is about the flu shot I got yesterday. Snif. Thu Dec 05 13:39:55 +0000 2013 Replying to @jwolman That article, man. Anybody who thinks Brooklyn is “dripping with authenticity” needs to be sent to a farm town for a year. Thu Dec 05 17:44:42 +0000 2013 Replying to @jwolman Oh definitely. I’m just picturing the reporter’s fists clenching when that guy started talking about the values of “my generation.” Thu Dec 05 17:46:01 +0000 2013 Replying to @jwolman I have been trying not to focus on that. Thu Dec 05 17:46:48 +0000 2013 Replying to @shannonmattern What? Shannon, that’s awful! I really hope today can behave better than that. Fri Dec 06 13:43:17 +0000 2013 Replying to @shannonmattern Seriously. I’m getting a bit misanthropic just hearing about it! Fri Dec 06 13:46:09 +0000 2013 Replying to @mkgold and @shannonmattern No kidding. People are effing nuts, have I mentioned that before? Fri Dec 06 13:57:19 +0000 2013 Replying to @jvinopal and @lettersfromvani Jargonesque: it’s from blackjack; if you get dealt a pair, you can split the cards into 2 hands & double your bet Fri Dec 06 20:34:19 +0000 2013 Replying to @derivativedos Thanks for the correction. Will try to remember next time I’m in Vegas. Sun Dec 08 01:00:46 +0000 2013 Replying to @pmhswe You might look at Airmail; it’s still in active development and it learned a lot from Sparrow. Sun Dec 08 16:02:06 +0000 2013 Replying to @pmhswe You’re welcome! I’m glad you like it; I’ve found it quite powerful. Like Sparrow, it gets Gmail labels, which no one else does. Sun Dec 08 17:32:11 +0000 2013 Replying to @surlyF I’m in DC already & it’s a mess here too. They’ve closed the NoVa schools tomorrow already. I’ll hope the flying is ok! Sun Dec 08 23:22:31 +0000 2013 Replying to @surlyF Oh wait. You mean you’re already here too. Duh. And welcome. Sun Dec 08 23:22:33 +0000 2013 Replying to @surlyF No kidding! We came down to spend the weekend in G’town; not terribly looking forward to the taxi-based hotel switch tomorrow. Sun Dec 08 23:31:10 +0000 2013 Replying to @sleonchnm and @dancohen Fairfax schools are also closed. It’s pretty sloppy out there. Sun Dec 08 23:42:17 +0000 2013 Replying to @sleonchnm and @dancohen I’ve got to get from Rosslyn/Georgetown to the Capital Hilton about that time. Not looking forward to the ride. Sun Dec 08 23:49:06 +0000 2013 Replying to @sleonchnm Possibly, though there’s still getting from the hotel to the metro on this end. I’m sure we’ll sort it out. Sun Dec 08 23:51:00 +0000 2013 Replying to @sleonchnm We walked the Key Bridge in for lunch today. It was… bracing, I think is the word. Sun Dec 08 23:53:46 +0000 2013 Replying to @sleonchnm We have to move tomorrow, though, because I’ve apparently wiped the hotel out of Irish & have had to move on to bourbon. Sun Dec 08 23:55:27 +0000 2013 Replying to @sleonchnm and @iceskatingbears I think that’s a fair assessment. #scholcomm Mon Dec 09 00:32:32 +0000 2013 Replying to @dancohen and @iceskatingbears CNI, of course! We will converge, weather permitting. Mon Dec 09 00:45:54 +0000 2013 Replying to @epistemographer and @dancohen Hey, excellent. I'll look forward to it. Mon Dec 09 00:54:47 +0000 2013 Replying to @seth_denbo NEW would be a big detour \(it’s the lakefront airport in New Orleans\) ! I hope they got you closer than that… Mon Dec 09 14:54:16 +0000 2013 Replying to @seth_denbo Ugh. It was a nasty day to be traveling; glad you’re safely on. Mon Dec 09 18:17:13 +0000 2013 RT @veek: Did you commit to reviewing #DH2014 proposals? PLEASE submit them before deadline this Sunday! Please RT, too. Mon Dec 09 18:46:12 +0000 2013 Replying to @JenHoward *waves from the front of the room* Mon Dec 09 18:52:01 +0000 2013 Replying to @JenHoward Yes! I was wondering why Cliff had wind chimes on stage with him. Mon Dec 09 18:54:33 +0000 2013 Replying to @wynkenhimself *totally ded of cute* Mon Dec 09 21:11:42 +0000 2013 Replying to @surlyF What’s a carbon copy? Thu Dec 12 15:23:46 +0000 2013 The very thought is painful. Thu Dec 12 15:24:38 +0000 2013 Seriously. I just want to sit down and cry. Thu Dec 12 15:27:10 +0000 2013 Replying to @ayjay It is the better course, without question. Thu Dec 12 15:31:37 +0000 2013 Replying to @ayjay In my case, it’s less my physical heart that is at risk, but the basic principle still holds. Thu Dec 12 15:33:22 +0000 2013 Replying to @briancroxall Familiar-looking, eh? Very nice early Christmas present! Fri Dec 13 18:09:27 +0000 2013 Replying to @samplereality Woo hoo! Congratulations. For better or for worse, I’m watching it tonight. Mon Dec 16 21:53:25 +0000 2013 Replying to @jmittell Will do! I’m so sorry this happened to you and your family! Thu Dec 19 13:19:52 +0000 2013 Replying to @jmittell and @nowviskie Actually, now that you say that, I have to acknowledge the possibility that the message was spoken rather than typed. Thu Dec 19 14:16:32 +0000 2013 Replying to @nowviskie and @jmittell It would certainly be less awful. A failure to correct poor transcription seems less awful. Thu Dec 19 15:44:07 +0000 2013 Replying to @nowviskie and @jmittell Indeed. Thu Dec 19 15:48:30 +0000 2013 Replying to @amandafrench, @nowviskie and @jmittell It’s possible, though the name I pixeled out did not encourage that conclusion. Are you logged in? Fri Dec 20 20:56:41 +0000 2013 Replying to @rgfeal, @jcmeloni and @nmhouston I believe one is! Fri Dec 20 20:57:46 +0000 2013 Replying to @jcmeloni Srsly, log in, and tell me if you still don’t have commenting privs. If so, something is wrong. Fri Dec 20 20:58:35 +0000 2013 Replying to @jcmeloni ARGH. Thanks for letting me know. We’ll try to see if we can reproduce. Were you logging in from @nmhouston’s post? Fri Dec 20 21:07:09 +0000 2013 Replying to @jcmeloni Oh dude, I know that problem. It was trying to take you to the dashboard, which you don’t have privs on. A bit of WP stupidity. Fri Dec 20 21:07:48 +0000 2013 Replying to @jcmeloni We’re trying to work on a fix for that. Fri Dec 20 21:08:04 +0000 2013 Replying to @jcmeloni Yeah, it’s a login redirect problem in multisite WP. Wants to take you to the dashboard of any blog, whether it’s yours or not. Sat Dec 21 01:27:58 +0000 2013 I moved in at the end of May. Today, nearly 7 months later, I hung the last of the pictures and dropped off a bunch of stuff for donation. Sun Dec 22 17:59:34 +0000 2013 Replying to @boone Five days after I moved I left the country and did not return until the nesting impulse had relented. Sun Dec 22 18:51:13 +0000 2013 Replying to @BendProf Yes! Can't speak for the hotel, but the neighborhood is fab. Good proximity to lots of great stuff. Quite safe at all hours. Sun Dec 22 21:36:23 +0000 2013 Replying to @captain_primate I'm so sorry to hear! I hope power is back way sooner than it sounds. :( Sun Dec 22 22:17:09 +0000 2013 New post at Planned Obsolescence: Tools and Values. http://wp.me/p2w8Sh-FD Tue Dec 24 14:23:15 +0000 2013 Replying to @jwolman Those sound... vaguely... familiar... Wed Dec 25 15:12:48 +0000 2013 Replying to @wynkenhimself Thanks, and to you too! Wed Dec 25 15:39:50 +0000 2013 Replying to @shermandorn Thanks so much, and happy holidays! Wed Dec 25 15:40:36 +0000 2013 Replying to @rrkennison And to you! Wed Dec 25 16:08:18 +0000 2013 Replying to @shanakimball And to you! And I’m drawing a complete blank on what it was. Any ideas? Fri Dec 27 13:03:16 +0000 2013 Replying to @copystar and @ImpactStory That would make sense, though I have a memory of the little pinwheels… Fri Dec 27 13:05:35 +0000 2013 Replying to @jenniferwaller Possibly Impact Story, but the site used the Altmetric donuts. Fri Dec 27 13:31:23 +0000 2013 Replying to @rogerwhitson It wasn’t them, but that’s a neat project. Fri Dec 27 13:35:12 +0000 2013 Replying to @jenniferwaller and @papershipapp Yes! That’s it. Info about the mobile program, web annotations, groups, & more! http://t.c… Fri Dec 27 21:56:03 +0000 2013 New post at Planned Obsolescence: Being Wrong. http://wp.me/p2w8Sh-FK Sun Dec 29 13:29:20 +0000 2013 Replying to @Ted_Underwood Indeed. Of course, I could be wrong. Sun Dec 29 14:20:24 +0000 2013 Replying to @Ted_Underwood Not \(just\) being funny there; it could represent a failure of my own experience rather than of grad school itself. Sun Dec 29 14:21:08 +0000 2013 Some very smart questions & thoughts from @brettbobley @elotroalex @jmittell & @cplong on my recent peer review post: http://www.plannedobsolescence.net/blog/tools-and-values/#comments Sun Dec 29 14:25:52 +0000 2013 Replying to @RohanMaitzen and @Ted_Underwood Absolutely! Developing an open enough voice as a blogger requires being prepared for your inevitable wrongness. Sun Dec 29 14:38:46 +0000 2013 Replying to @cplong and @PubPhilJ Fantastic! I’ll look forward to hearing more. Sun Dec 29 15:56:23 +0000 2013 Replying to @Ted_Underwood, @ayjay and @nowviskie I completely agree, but would suggest that there is a quite charged politics around the notion of humility. Sun Dec 29 16:11:44 +0000 2013 Replying to @Ted_Underwood, @ayjay and @nowviskie I also regret that this conversation isn’t being captured in the comments on the post itself… Sun Dec 29 16:12:52 +0000 2013 Replying to @ayjay Interesting! I really long to drag the conversations back the other direction, where they can play out more ruminatively. Sun Dec 29 16:14:44 +0000 2013 Replying to @KLeuner, @Ted_Underwood, @ayjay and @nowviskie Exactly what I’m working on. I don’t want to let this slip away. Sun Dec 29 16:22:34 +0000 2013 Replying to @ayjay Thank you! I do appreciate it. Sun Dec 29 16:26:43 +0000 2013 Replying to @karikraus Thanks, Kari! Tue Dec 31 22:30:26 +0000 2013 \(Okay, there are huge lists of things I didn’t manage to do, but that’s the only thing I swore I’d complete and didn’t\. See?\) Tue Dec 31 22:31:21 +0000 2013 Replying to @wynkenhimself Totally! Tue Dec 31 22:36:38 +0000 2013 Replying to @ricksva Pynchon’s latest. Fri Jan 24 01:20:37 +0000 2014 Replying to @katinalynn I… I just… Wow. Fri Jan 24 03:15:13 +0000 2014 In for my annual mammogram today. Last year’s resulted in an ultrasound, needle biopsy, and \(thank god\) an all-clear. Fri Jan 24 15:19:58 +0000 2014 Today’s ultrasound involved a lot of pictures in a lot of places. Waiting now for the results. Fri Jan 24 15:20:49 +0000 2014 I’ve done this every year for ten years now, and it doesn’t seem to get easier. But I’m grateful for access to good care. Fri Jan 24 15:22:17 +0000 2014 And all clear. Fri Jan 24 15:24:03 +0000 2014 Replying to @LibSkrat It is, as the man said, the hardest part. Fri Jan 24 15:24:52 +0000 2014 This brief live tweeting brought to you by my personal campaign to remind you of the importance of early detection. #fuckcancer Fri Jan 24 15:28:52 +0000 2014 RT @magpie: @kfitz Hurrah early detection. And, in light of my own experience in 2013, remind people to check their neck? http://t.co/WILf9… Fri Jan 24 16:03:05 +0000 2014 RT @terrainsvagues: .@kfitz My great friend @redroostah is in surgery as I type, post-chemo, because of testicular cancer. Please send ligh… Fri Jan 24 16:03:17 +0000 2014 Replying to @LibSkrat Heh. Still holding to that. Fri Jan 24 16:14:34 +0000 2014 Palgrave Macmillan is launching an open peer review trial: http://palgraveopenreview.com/ Mon Jan 27 14:55:40 +0000 2014 Replying to @academicdave Good question. I haven’t seen anything either. Mon Jan 27 15:02:09 +0000 2014 RT @katinalynn: Very happy to announce a few big changes at #Alt-Academy! New cluster, new e-book, new editor: http://mediacommons.futureofthebook.org/alt-ac/pieces/new-growth-alt-academy #altac Mon Jan 27 16:42:39 +0000 2014 Very exciting new work and new developments at @MediaCommons’s #alt-academy! Thanks to @nowviskie, @katinalynn, and @briancroxall. Mon Jan 27 16:43:30 +0000 2014 Another snowfall. Another travel day. Another set of train delays & cancellations. Need to be in Philly by 9.30. Cross your fingers for me. Wed Jan 29 11:58:43 +0000 2014 So much for the QUIET car, eh, guys in suits? Wed Jan 29 12:21:05 +0000 2014 Replying to @wynkenhimself I always forget that! Wed Jan 29 12:31:27 +0000 2014 Replying to @mmwwah NYC, happily. Wed Jan 29 12:31:57 +0000 2014 There is a particular joy in seeing quiet-car-flouting guys in suits get fussed at by the conductor. There is probably a German word for it. Wed Jan 29 12:42:13 +0000 2014 Replying to @CapitolClio YES. Wed Jan 29 12:59:00 +0000 2014 Today in Philadelphia: @MLAnews is hosting a meeting with reps of ARL, CLIR, AHA, ACLS & others to discuss preservation and primary records. Wed Jan 29 13:01:46 +0000 2014 Replying to @debcha I have only ever been able to approve via the web. SO frustrating. If you find an alternative, let me know. Wed Jan 29 13:03:46 +0000 2014 Replying to @debcha and @yayitsrob Good to know - thanks! Wed Jan 29 13:27:06 +0000 2014 Suited dude behind me finally stopped talking, put on headphones — and promptly started humming along. Wed Jan 29 13:44:33 +0000 2014 Dude, I do not think “inaudible” means what you think it means. Wed Jan 29 13:45:49 +0000 2014 Replying to @seth_denbo Thankfully, mine is not That Guy in That Suit. Wed Jan 29 14:35:50 +0000 2014 Replying to @amycsc Not in this meeting, alas - but this is the start of a long project, and I’d love to get @archivists_org involved! Wed Jan 29 14:58:31 +0000 2014 Replying to @amycsc and @archivists_org It’s a factor of the origins of the project - revisiting a project originally conducted by MLA, AHA, and ARL. Wed Jan 29 15:01:48 +0000 2014 Replying to @lbdehertogh and @karikraus Oh brilliant. Thank you! Wed Jan 29 15:37:58 +0000 2014 Replying to @publichistorian So much sympathy, and much concern. Fri Jan 31 15:18:44 +0000 2014

docs.text: Replying to @amandafrench As the man says, it is far more important to look good than to think good, & dahling, you look mahvelous! \(Srsly, awesome do\.\) Sat Feb 01 22:04:14 +0000 2014 Oh, it’s *that* season, is it? 50-degree day to clear away the old cruddy snow, followed immediately by another snowfall. Sigh. I was kinda thinking along these lines. Except with snowy owls. http://www.youtube.com/embed/uuYPCP2RSXA?autoplay=1 Tue Feb 04 18:26:34 +0000 2014 I’m not sure whether it’s a good thing that this plane has wifi. Nominate your friends! http://bit.ly/10Dyhmj #fb Tue Feb 04 20:58:52 +0000 2014 Replying to @msbonn So sorry! I managed to have the trip I’m on slot right in between yesterday’s storm and tonight’s storm. \(Here’s hoping I get home\.\) Wed Feb 05 01:40:45 +0000 2014 Replying to @PaulaKrebs Congrats to the teen, and to you too! Wed Feb 05 17:26:06 +0000 2014 I do not say it often enough. But really, truly: I love you, Eduroam. Wed Feb 05 17:47:25 +0000 2014 Replying to @jmittell It’s an astonishing thing to open your laptop on some random campus and have it just connect. Wed Feb 05 17:50:17 +0000 2014 RT @rgfeal: Have your read essays on the Common Core Standards by @DianeRavitch and others, published in PROFESSION? http://profession.commons.mla.org/ Thu Feb 06 18:23:15 +0000 2014 Replying to @samplereality Woo hoo! Mon Feb 10 20:54:21 +0000 2014 Replying to @wynkenhimself It’s a good idea to remain alert for issuances of any variety at all. Mon Feb 10 21:01:30 +0000 2014 Replying to @zonal Hi. We’ve been discussing in house. Will email later today, time permitting! Tue Feb 11 17:37:48 +0000 2014 Replying to @zonal Actually, it would be helpful, if you have one handy! Tue Feb 11 21:00:39 +0000 2014 Replying to @hjoseph That’s how I learned it, too - but in this case, the candidate was brung by the department, so. \(Also, MLA: “brought\.”\) Tue Feb 11 21:33:09 +0000 2014 Replying to @hjoseph Aw, not so! Tue Feb 11 21:37:58 +0000 2014 Replying to @rrkennison Thanks, R! Tue Feb 11 21:45:39 +0000 2014 Replying to @wynkenhimself and @miriamkp People visiting NYC need to say hi to me! Undoubtedly there is some advantage to market-friendliness - which raises lots of questions about paths not taken. Wed Feb 12 14:55:44 +0000 2014 Replying to @ayjay Thanks, Alan! Wed Feb 12 15:02:46 +0000 2014 @plragde For real? I’m coming to Waterloo \(for a conf at WLU\) on Friday, assuming my flight goes. How many layers of HeatTech will I need? Wed Feb 12 15:17:03 +0000 2014 Replying to @plragde Well, I’m glad it’ll be warmer there, and I’m glad you’ll be somewhere even warmer, but I’m sorry I’ll miss you. Again! Wed Feb 12 15:43:20 +0000 2014 Replying to @LibSkrat :( Thu Feb 13 00:10:15 +0000 2014 Replying to @LibSkrat Those things are a real Achilles heel. \(Har har, but srsly, sorry\.\) Thu Feb 13 00:17:04 +0000 2014 Dear Google Chrome: your new PDF viewer *never* works the first time, even with PDFs that are in Drive. And sometimes it never works at all. Thu Feb 13 19:31:56 +0000 2014 This is super uncool. Loading a PDF should not be a big deal. And downloading or printing one should not take 3 steps. Thu Feb 13 19:32:56 +0000 2014 Replying to @wynkenhimself It’s almost enough to make me go back to Safari. Thu Feb 13 19:37:08 +0000 2014 Replying to @sxflynn Indeed. I’m shocked by how badly they’ve broken PDF rendering, and that they’ve left it broken for weeks. Thu Feb 13 19:42:47 +0000 2014 Replying to @CapitolClio, @brettbobley and @wynkenhimself No, they’ve really broken things — and they’ve left them broken for weeks. Thu Feb 13 19:43:15 +0000 2014 Replying to @brettbobley, @wynkenhimself and @CapitolClio I’m 98% sure it’s Chrome; I don’t use an Acrobat plugin. & I did the new profile thing, too - nada. Thu Feb 13 19:50:01 +0000 2014 Just got an email from my gas company telling me they’re ready for winter storm Pax. Given that it started over 18 hours ago, I should hope. Fri Feb 14 00:18:24 +0000 2014 Replying to @wynkenhimself I rediscovered not long ago that I gave @jbj his gmail invite back in the day. Fri Feb 14 02:08:24 +0000 2014 @amndw2 Hi, Amanda! *waves from the center of the balcony* Fri Feb 14 02:19:17 +0000 2014 Replying to @wynkenhimself COMCAST!!! *shakes fist* Fri Feb 14 02:20:27 +0000 2014 Replying to @amndw2 Just amazing, wasn’t it? Fri Feb 14 05:13:29 +0000 2014 Replying to @JenHoward Is there a code for the obsessive reloading of a flight status page? Fri Feb 14 18:30:48 +0000 2014 I like American’s can-do spirit. Departure is at 8.05; at 8.02, completely unboarded, still listed as on time. You go, American! Sat Feb 15 01:05:03 +0000 2014 \(No, seriously\. You go\. Now\.\) Sat Feb 15 01:05:35 +0000 2014 This after a flight cancellation, getting rebooked on an oversold flight, and getting passed from airline to airline with a five hour wait. Sat Feb 15 01:07:30 +0000 2014 Replying to @brettbobley We are awaiting one crew member who will apparently arrive at 8.11. And yet we are on time! Sat Feb 15 01:08:34 +0000 2014 Replying to @nancybaym That would be ideal, yes. Sat Feb 15 01:09:01 +0000 2014 Replying to @sleonchnm New York. *sigh* Sat Feb 15 01:09:18 +0000 2014 Replying to @sleonchnm Yep. Sat Feb 15 01:12:10 +0000 2014 I’ve moved almost all of my notetaking and drafting into Ulysses III \(http://ulyssesapp\.com\) and have been very happy with it. + Sat Feb 15 15:25:44 +0000 2014 I just wish that it synced everything with Daedalus, and not just the stuff in the Daedalus group. I’d like access to *all* my notes on iOS. Sat Feb 15 15:27:54 +0000 2014 Replying to @warnick Syncing across computers via iCloud is seamless. And syncing the Daedalus stuff with iOS is, too. But I don’t see why you can’t + Sat Feb 15 15:58:39 +0000 2014 Replying to @warnick get the full iCloud sync onto Daedalus. Sat Feb 15 15:58:53 +0000 2014 Replying to @LibSkrat Have I already asked you what you’re moving to? I’m pretty sure I have. But I’ll ask again in case…? Sat Feb 15 16:21:23 +0000 2014 Replying to @LibSkrat Nice! Sat Feb 15 16:26:10 +0000 2014 Replying to @LibSkrat That’s a good thing. Alas, my dependency keeps growing. Sat Feb 15 16:29:53 +0000 2014 Replying to @LibSkrat Srsly. Sat Feb 15 16:32:58 +0000 2014 Replying to @warnick Completely. It’s been great for organizing and focusing. Sat Feb 15 16:51:49 +0000 2014 Replying to @Ed_Raso It’s very cool, and so easy to write in Markdown & export to numerous formats. Sat Feb 15 17:09:58 +0000 2014 RT @eetempleton: Good advice: http://tsl.pomona.edu/articles/2013/11/15/opinions/4501-take-useless-classes-advice-from-a-sage-hen Sat Feb 15 17:22:40 +0000 2014 Case in point for why teaching there was the best job in the universe. #lrt Sat Feb 15 17:23:11 +0000 2014 Replying to @Ed_Raso Maybe! It’s worth downloading the demo, reading through the \(brief\) documentation, and playing around with it. Sat Feb 15 17:23:55 +0000 2014 Replying to @ricksva and @warnick mentioned it to me. Its flexible organization & syncing plus use of Markdown were a big improvement on Evernote for me. Sat Feb 15 18:35:01 +0000 2014 Replying to @warnick and @ricksva I’m sorry to hear that! I haven’t tried to get them to work together - but that wasn’t part of my Word workflow either. Sat Feb 15 19:48:33 +0000 2014 Replying to @maximolly Congrats, Dr. Molly! Mon Feb 17 18:57:36 +0000 2014 Replying to @alicetiara I bought two awesome new pairs of shoes last month. I don’t know what I was thinking. Tue Feb 18 12:24:03 +0000 2014 Replying to @alicetiara Exactly. I’ve been in an endless rotation of the same 3-4 skirts with tights & boots. I so look forward to pants & fancy shoes. Tue Feb 18 12:27:12 +0000 2014 Replying to @alicetiara Indeed. And given that highs are projected for the 40s all week \(& even 50 on Friday\!\) , here’s hoping for a fast if sloppy melt. Tue Feb 18 12:33:31 +0000 2014 Replying to @CameronNeylon See you in KC!
